27909.title: The World War II Crisis Innovation Model: What Was It, and Where Does It Apply?
27909.zh_title: 二战危机创新模式：它是什么，适用于何处？
27909.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
27909.abstract: World War II was one of the most acute emergencies in U.S. history, and the first where mobilizing science and technology was a major part of the government response. The U.S. Office of Scientific Research and Development (OSRD) led a far-ranging research effort to develop technologies and medical treatments that not only helped win the war, but also transformed civilian life, while laying the foundation for postwar innovation policy after it was dissolved. Scholars and policymakers have appealed to the wartime model as a template for other problems, often invoking the Manhattan Project rather than OSRD, which initiated and managed the broader effort of which atomic fission and dozens of other programs were a part. In this paper we bring OSRD into focus, describe how it worked, and explore what insights its experience offers today. We argue that several aspects of OSRD continue to be relevant, especially in crises, while also cautioning on the limits to generalizing from World War II to other settings.
27909.zh_abstract: 第二次世界大战是美国历史上最严重的紧急情况之一，也是动员科学技术成为政府应对措施主要组成部分的第一次。美国科学研究与发展办公室领导了一项广泛的研究工作，开发技术和医疗方法，这不仅帮助赢得了战争，也改变了平民生活，同时在其解散后为战后创新政策奠定了基础。学者和政策制定者曾将战时模式作为其他问题的模板，通常引用曼哈顿计划而非OSRD，而OSRD发起并管理了包括核裂变和数十个其他项目在内的更广泛努力。在本文中，我们聚焦OSRD，描述其运作方式，并探讨其经验今天能提供哪些见解。我们认为，OSRD的若干方面至今仍具有相关性，尤其是在危机中，同时我们也提醒注意从二战推广到其他情境的局限性。
27909.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, PR；JEL：H12, H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O38

27908.title: Who Should Work from Home during a Pandemic? The Wage-Infection Trade-off
27908.zh_title: 疫情期间谁应居家办公？工资与感染的权衡
27908.authors: Sangmin Aum, Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Yongseok Shin
27908.abstract: Shutting down the workplace is an effective means of reducing contagion, but can incur large economic losses. We construct an exposure index, which measures infection risks across occupations, and a work-from-home index, which gauges the ease with which a job can be performed remotely across both industries and occupations. Because the two indices are negatively correlated but distinct, the economic costs of containing a pandemic can be minimized by only sending home those jobs that are highly exposed but easy to perform from home. Compared to a lockdown of all non-essential jobs, the optimal policy attains the same reduction in aggregate exposure (32 percent) with one-third fewer workers sent home (24 vs. 36 percent) and with only half the loss in aggregate wages (15 vs. 30 percent). A move from the lockdown to the optimal policy reduces the exposure of low-wage workers the most and the wage loss of the high-wage workers the most, although everyone's wage losses become smaller. A constrained optimal policy under which health workers cannot be sent home still achieves the same exposure reduction with a one-third smaller loss in aggregate wages (19 vs. 30 percent).
27908.zh_abstract: 关闭工作场所是减少传染的有效手段，但可能造成巨大的经济损失。我们构建了一个暴露指数，用于衡量不同职业的感染风险；同时构建了一个居家办公指数，用于评估不同行业和职业中工作可远程完成的难易程度。由于这两个指数呈负相关但彼此不同，因此，仅让那些暴露风险高但易于居家完成的工作者回家，可以最小化控制疫情的经济成本。与封锁所有非必要工作岗位相比，最优政策在实现相同的总体暴露减少（32%）的情况下，让回家的工人减少了三分之一（24%对36%），且总体工资损失仅为一半（15%对30%）。从封锁政策转向最优政策，对低工资工人的暴露减少最多，对高工资工人的工资损失减少最多，尽管每个人的工资损失都变得更小。即使在卫生工作者不能回家的约束条件下，最优政策仍能实现相同的暴露减少，且总体工资损失减少三分之一（19%对30%）。

27907.title: Flight to Safety: How Economic Downturns Affect Talent Flows to Startups
27907.zh_title: 避险行为：经济衰退如何影响人才流向初创企业
27907.authors: Shai Bernstein, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
27907.abstract: Using proprietary data from AngelList Talent, we study how individuals’ job search and application behavior changed during the COVID downturn. We find that job seekers shifted their searches toward more established firms and away from early-stage startups, even within the same individual over time. Simultaneously, they broadened their other search parameters. Relative to more established firms, early-stage startups experienced a decline in applications, primarily driven by higher quality candidates. These declines hold within a firm or job posting over time. Our findings uncover a flight to safety channel in the labor market, which may amplify the pro-cyclical nature of entrepreneurial activities.
27907.zh_abstract: 利用AngelList Talent的专有数据，我们研究了在COVID-19经济衰退期间，个人的求职和申请行为如何变化。我们发现，求职者将搜索方向转向更成熟的企业，远离早期初创企业，即使在同一人随时间变化的行为中也是如此。同时，他们拓宽了其他搜索参数。与更成熟的企业相比，早期初创企业的申请数量下降，这主要是由更高质量的候选人减少所致。这些下降在同一企业或职位发布随时间变化的情况下依然成立。我们的发现揭示了劳动力市场中的一种“避险”渠道，这可能会放大创业活动的顺周期性。
27907.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：E32, J22, J24, L26, M13

27906.title: A Helicopter Tour of Some Underlying Issues In Empirical Industrial Organization
27906.zh_title: 实证产业组织若干基础问题的概览
27906.abstract: The paper considers conceptual issues underlying empirical work on markets. It has three parts. The first reviews the analysis of demand and equilibrium in retail markets and then considers recent advances in the analysis of markets which require different assumptions; markets where adverse selection and moral hazard may be important, vertical markets with bargaining, and markets wherein a centralized allocation mechanism replaces prices. The second part considers the analysis of cost and production. It reviews the simultaneity and selection issues in production function estimation and then considers; the distinction between revenue and quantity generating functions and its implications for the analysis of markups, and the empirical analysis of fixed costs and its implications for the analysis of product repositioning. The paper concludes by considering issues that arise due to the complexity of empirical analysis of market dynamics and appropriate ways of dealing with them.
27906.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了市场实证研究背后的概念性问题。全文分为三部分。第一部分回顾了零售市场中需求与均衡的分析，然后考虑了需要不同假设的市场分析的最新进展：逆向选择和道德风险可能重要的市场、存在讨价还价的垂直市场，以及集中化分配机制取代价格的市场。第二部分考虑了成本与生产的分析。它回顾了生产函数估计中的联立性和选择性问题，然后探讨了：收入生成函数与数量生成函数之间的区别及其对加成率分析的影响，以及固定成本的实证分析及其对产品重新定位分析的影响。本文最后考虑了由于市场动态实证分析的复杂性而产生的问题，以及处理这些问题的适当方法。

27905.title: Trade with Nominal Rigidities: Understanding the Unemployment and Welfare Effects of the China Shock
27905.zh_title: 名义刚性下的贸易：理解中国冲击的失业与福利效应
27905.authors: Andrés Rodríguez-Clare, Mauricio Ulate, José P. Vásquez
27905.abstract: We present a dynamic quantitative trade and migration model that incorporates downward nominal wage rigidities and show how this framework can generate changes in unemployment and labor participation that match those uncovered by the empirical literature studying the “China shock.” We find that the China shock leads to average welfare increases in most U.S. states, including many that experience unemployment during the transition. However, nominal rigidities reduce the overall U.S. gains by around two thirds. In addition, there are 18 states that experience welfare losses in the presence of downward nominal wage rigidity that would have experienced gains without it.
27905.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个包含向下名义工资刚性的动态定量贸易与移民模型，并展示了该框架如何产生与实证研究“中国冲击”文献所揭示的失业和劳动参与率变化相匹配的结果。我们发现，中国冲击导致美国大多数州的平均福利增加，包括许多在转型期间经历失业的州。然而，名义刚性使美国的总体收益减少了约三分之二。此外，在存在向下名义工资刚性的情况下，有18个州经历了福利损失，而如果没有这种刚性，这些州本应获得收益。

27904.title: Distance, Empire, and British Exports Over Two Centuries
27904.zh_title: 距离、帝国与两个世纪以来的英国出口
27904.authors: David S. Jacks, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke, Alan M. Taylor, Yoto Yotov
27904.abstract: We introduce a new dataset on British exports at the bilateral, commodity-level from 1700 to 1899. We then pit two primary determinants of bilateral trade against one another: the trade-diminishing effects of distance versus the trade-enhancing effects of the British Empire. We find that the impact of gravity fell by a factor of roughly three between the 1780s and 1850s. The impact of empire on British exports was extremely large throughout, but the impact of 18th century mercantilism was much higher than that of empire in the liberal late 19th century.
27904.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个新的数据集，涵盖1700年至1899年英国在双边、商品层面的出口数据。然后，我们比较了双边贸易的两个主要决定因素：距离的贸易减少效应与英帝国的贸易促进效应。我们发现，引力效应在1780年代至1850年代之间下降了大约三分之二。帝国对英国出口的影响在整个时期内都非常巨大，但18世纪重商主义的影响远高于19世纪末自由主义时期帝国的影响。

27903.title: Emerging Markets Sovereign CDS Spreads During COVID-19: Economics versus Epidemiology News
27903.zh_title: COVID-19期间新兴市场主权CDS利差：经济新闻与流行病学新闻
27903.authors: Timo Daehler, Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak
27903.abstract: Can bad news about COVID-19 induce negative expectations on sovereign credit risks? We investigate the factors driving credit default swap (CDS) spreads of emerging market sovereigns around the outbreak of COVID-19. Using 2014-2019 data, we estimate a two-factor model of global and regional risks and then extrapolate the model-implied spreads for the period July 2019–June 2020. Intriguingly, the model initially predicts the realized spreads well but loses predictive accuracy during the COVID-19 pandemic. Fiscal space and oil-revenue dependence primarily drive the differences between the realized and predicted sovereign spreads. Our augmented-factor model indicates that the cumulative COVID-19 mortality rate growth is positively associated with the CDS spreads. The evidence suggests that the epidemiological deterioration can lower confidence in the sovereign credit markets due to the prospects of prolonged lockdowns and a slower GDP growth recovery. Our results also hold for a single regression of daily spread changes during 2014-2020.
27903.zh_abstract: 关于COVID-19的坏消息能否引发对主权信用风险的负面预期？我们研究了COVID-19爆发前后新兴市场主权信用违约互换（CDS）利差的驱动因素。利用2014-2019年的数据，我们估计了一个包含全球和区域风险的双因子模型，然后外推了2019年7月至2020年6月期间模型隐含的利差。有趣的是，该模型最初能很好地预测实际利差，但在COVID-19大流行期间失去了预测准确性。财政空间和石油收入依赖性是实际与预测主权利差差异的主要驱动因素。我们的扩展因子模型表明，累计COVID-19死亡率增长与CDS利差正相关。证据表明，由于长期封锁和GDP增长复苏放缓的前景，流行病学状况恶化可能降低主权信贷市场的信心。我们的结果在2014-2020年每日利差变化的单一回归中也成立。

27902.title: Public Policy and Participation in Political Interest Groups: An Analysis of Minimum Wages, Labor Unions, and Effective Advocacy
27902.zh_title: 公共政策与政治利益集团参与：最低工资、工会与有效倡导的分析
27902.abstract: Why do individuals join interest groups? Through what channels do interest groups and public policy affect one another? We study these questions by analyzing the interplay among labor unions, minimum wages, news coverage, and public opinion. Over the past decade, labor unions have played a significant role in advocating for state and federal minimum wage increases. Over this period, we find that each dollar in minimum wage increase predicts a 5 percent increase (0.3 pp) in the union membership rate among individuals age 16–40. We document four additional facts that shed light on the mechanisms that may underlie this finding. First, while we find increases overall in union membership, we find declines among the minimum wage’s most direct beneficiaries. This is consistent with a classic “free-riding” hypothesis. Second, we find increases in union membership among much broader groups that are not directly affected by the minimum wage. Third, we find that minimum wage increases predict increases in unions’ favorability ratings among the public. Fourth, we find that events in the legislative histories of minimum wage increases predict increases in counts of newspaper articles that simultaneously discuss the minimum wage and key players in the labor movement. Overall coverage of organized labor shifts towards articles that discuss the minimum wage. These facts are consistent with models in which a desire to affiliate with “effective advocacy” is an important driver of the decision to participate in unions and other politically oriented groups.
27902.zh_abstract: 个人为何加入利益集团？利益集团与公共政策如何相互影响？我们通过分析工会、最低工资、新闻报道和公众舆论之间的相互作用来研究这些问题。在过去十年中，工会在倡导州和联邦最低工资上涨方面发挥了重要作用。在此期间，我们发现，每增加一美元的最低工资，预测16-40岁人群的工会会员率将增加5%（0.3个百分点）。我们记录了四个额外的事实，揭示了可能支撑这一发现的机制。首先，虽然我们发现工会会员总体增加，但在最低工资最直接的受益者中却出现了下降。这与经典的“搭便车”假说一致。其次，我们发现，在不受最低工资直接影响的更广泛群体中，工会会员有所增加。第三，我们发现最低工资上涨预示着公众对工会的好感度上升。第四，我们发现最低工资上涨立法过程中的事件，预示着同时讨论最低工资和劳工运动关键人物的报纸文章数量增加。对工会组织的整体报道转向讨论最低工资的文章。这些事实与以下模型一致：即对“有效倡导”的归属感是决定加入工会和其他政治导向团体的重要驱动因素。

27901.title: Global Financial Cycle and Liquidity Management
27901.zh_title: 全球金融周期与流动性管理
27901.abstract: We use a tractable model to show that emerging markets can protect themselves from the global financial cycle by expanding (rather than restricting) capital flows. This involves accumulating reserves when global liquidity is high to buy back domestic assets at a discount when global financial conditions tighten. Since the private sector does not internalize how this buffering mechanism reduces international borrowing costs, a social planner increases the size of capital flows beyond the laissez-faire equilibrium. The model also provides a role for foreign exchange intervention in less financially developed countries. The main predictions of the model are consistent with the data.
27901.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个易于处理的模型表明，新兴市场可以通过扩大（而非限制）资本流动来保护自己免受全球金融周期的影响。这包括在全球流动性高时积累储备，以便在全球金融状况收紧时以折扣价回购国内资产。由于私人部门没有内化这种缓冲机制降低国际借贷成本的作用，社会规划者会将资本流动规模扩大到自由放任均衡之上。该模型也为金融欠发达国家的外汇干预提供了作用依据。该模型的主要预测与数据一致。

27900.title: Deterrence Effects of Antifraud and Abuse Enforcement in Health Care
27900.zh_title: 医疗保健领域反欺诈与滥用执法的威慑效应
27900.abstract: Estimates of the benefits of antifraud enforcement in health care typically focus on direct monetary damages. Deterrence effects are acknowledged but unquantified. We evaluate the impact of a Department of Justice investigation of hospitals accused of billing Medicare for unnecessary implantable cardiac defibrillator (ICD) procedures on their use. Using 100% inpatient and outpatient procedure data from Florida, we estimate that the investigation caused a 22% decline in unnecessary ICD implantations. The present value of savings nationally over a 10 year period is $\$2.7$ billion, nearly 10 times larger than the $\$280$ million in settlements the Department of Justice recovered from hospitals. The investigation had a large and long-lasting effect on physician behavior, indicating the utility of antifraud enforcement as a tool for reducing wasteful medical care.
27900.zh_abstract: 医疗保健领域反欺诈执法的收益估算通常侧重于直接货币损害赔偿。威慑效应虽被承认但未量化。我们评估了美国司法部对涉嫌向医疗保险收取不必要植入式心脏复律除颤器（ICD）手术费用的医院进行调查的影响。利用佛罗里达州100%的住院和门诊手术数据，我们估计该调查导致不必要的ICD植入量下降了22%。全国范围内10年期间的储蓄现值为27亿美元，几乎是司法部从医院追回的2.8亿美元和解金的10倍。该调查对医生行为产生了巨大且持久的影响，表明反欺诈执法作为减少浪费性医疗保健工具的有效性。

27945.title: Bank Liquidity Provision Across the Firm Size Distribution
27945.zh_title: 银行流动性供给与企业规模分布
27945.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Olivier Darmouni, Stephan Luck, Matthew C. Plosser
27945.abstract: We use supervisory loan-level data to document that small firms (SMEs) obtain shorter maturity credit lines than large firms; have less active maturity management; post more collateral; have higher utilization rates; and pay higher spreads. We rationalize these facts as the equilibrium outcome of a trade-off between lender commitment and discretion. Using the COVID recession, we test the prediction that SMEs are subject to greater lender discretion by examining credit line utilization. We show that SMEs do not drawdown in contrast to large firms despite SME demand, but that PPP loans helped alleviate the shortfall.
27945.zh_abstract: 我们利用监管层面的贷款数据记录到，小企业（SMEs）获得的信贷额度期限比大企业短；其期限管理活跃度较低；抵押品要求更高；信贷额度利用率更高；且支付的利差更高。我们将这些事实合理化，视为贷款人承诺与自由裁量权之间权衡的均衡结果。利用新冠疫情衰退，我们通过考察信贷额度使用情况来检验小企业面临更大贷款人自由裁量权的预测。我们发现，尽管小企业有需求，但它们并未像大企业那样提取信贷额度，而薪资保护计划（PPP）贷款有助于缓解这一短缺。

27944.title: Temptation and Commitment: A Model of Hand-to-Mouth Behavior
27944.zh_title: 诱惑与承诺：一个“手到口”消费行为的模型
27944.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Agnes Kovacs, Patrick Moran
27944.abstract: This paper presents a model of consumption behavior that explains the presence of ‘wealthy hand-to-mouth’ consumers using a mechanism that differs from those analyzed previously. We show that a two-asset model with temptation preferences generates a demand for commitment and thus illiquidity, leading to hand-to-mouth behavior even when liquid assets deliver higher returns than illiquid assets. This preference for illiquidity has important implications for consumption behaviour and for fiscal stimulus policies. Our model matches the recent empirical evidence that MPCs remain high even for large income shocks, suggesting a larger response to targeted fiscal stimulus than previously believed.
27944.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个消费行为模型，该模型通过一种与以往分析不同的机制来解释“富裕的手到口”消费者的存在。我们证明，一个包含诱惑偏好的双资产模型会产生对承诺（从而对非流动性）的需求，即使流动性资产带来的回报高于非流动性资产，也会导致手到口行为。这种对非流动性的偏好对消费行为和财政刺激政策具有重要影响。我们的模型与近期实证证据相符，即即使面对大额收入冲击，边际消费倾向（MPC）仍然很高，这表明对定向财政刺激的反应比先前认为的更大。

27943.title: Medical Research and Health Care Finance: Evidence from Academic Medical Centers
27943.zh_title: 医学研究与医疗融资：来自学术医疗中心的证据
27943.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Misty L. Heggeness, Jennifer L. Kao
27943.abstract: Academic Medical Centers (AMCs)—comprising medical schools, teaching hospitals, and research laboratories—play an important role in US biomedical innovation. The Balanced Budget Act of 1997 changed reimbursements for Medicare inpatient claims and subsidies for medical residents. We compare AMCs' relative exposure to the reform and how these differences affect their researchers' ability to attract NIH grant funding, as well as the quantity, impact, and content of their publications. We find that in response to the reform, research activity increases by approximately 6%, with larger effects observed for “translational” and clinical research. We find little effect on clinical outcomes.
27943.zh_abstract: 学术医疗中心（AMCs）——包括医学院、教学医院和研究实验室——在美国生物医学创新中扮演着重要角色。1997年的《平衡预算法案》改变了医疗保险住院索赔的报销方式以及对医学住院医师的补贴。我们比较了各学术医疗中心对该改革的相对暴露程度，以及这些差异如何影响其研究人员吸引美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）资助的能力，以及其出版物的数量、影响和内容。我们发现，作为对该改革的回应，研究活动增加了约6%，其中对“转化”研究和临床研究的影响更大。我们几乎没有发现对临床结果的影响。

27942.title: Have Exchange-Listed Firms Become Less Important for the Economy?
27942.zh_title: 交易所上市公司对经济的重要性是否已下降？
27942.authors: Frederik P. Schlingemann, René M. Stulz
27942.abstract: The firms listed on the stock market in aggregate contribute less to total non-farm employment and GDP now than in the 1970s. A major reason for this development is the decline of manufacturing and the growth of the service economy as firms providing services are less likely to be listed on exchanges. A firm’s stock market capitalization is much less instructive about its employment now than in earlier years. Listed stock market superstars account for less employment than they did in the 1970s. Market capitalizations have not become systematically less informative about firms’ contribution to GDP.
27942.zh_abstract: 总体而言，股票市场上市的公司对非农就业总量和国内生产总值（GDP）的贡献现在低于20世纪70年代。这一发展的一个主要原因是制造业的衰落和服务经济的增长，因为提供服务的公司上市的可能性较低。现在，一家公司的股票市值对其就业情况的指示作用远不如早年。上市股市巨星所贡献的就业量低于20世纪70年代。市值对公司GDP贡献的信息含量并未系统性降低。
27942.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：E44, G23, G32, K22, L16

27941.title: A Theory of Voluntary Testing and Self-isolation in an Ongoing Pandemic
27941.zh_title: 持续大流行中自愿检测与自我隔离的理论
27941.abstract: Thinking beyond Covid-19, there is a growing interest in what economic structures will be needed to face ongoing pandemics. In this paper we focus on the diagnostic problem and examine a new paradigm of voluntary self-testing by private individuals. People without symptoms face daily choices of either taking the risk of going out (to work and socialize), versus staying at home in self-isolation. Our theory shows that two types of people voluntary test themselves: those who otherwise would have self-isolated, and those who would have gone out indiscriminately. Our central insight is that the equilibrium infection risk falls when home-based testing becomes cheaper and easier to use, even if tests are not always accurate. Our results challenge the clinical mainstream view that diagnostic testing is a prerogative of the medical profession, and supports the notion that frequent self-testing is vital for an economy facing an ongoing pandemic.
27941.zh_abstract: 超越新冠疫情，人们越来越关注需要什么样的经济结构来应对持续的大流行。在本文中，我们聚焦于诊断问题，并研究一种由私人个体进行自愿自我检测的新范式。没有症状的人每天都面临着选择：要么冒险外出（工作和社交），要么待在家中自我隔离。我们的理论表明，有两类人会自愿进行检测：一类是原本会自我隔离的人，另一类是原本会不加区分地外出的人。我们的核心见解是，当家庭检测变得更便宜、更易用时，均衡感染风险会下降，即使检测并非总是准确。我们的结果挑战了临床主流观点——即诊断检测是医疗行业的特权，并支持了以下观点：频繁的自我检测对于面临持续大流行的经济体至关重要。

27940.title: Who Benefits From the Child Tax Credit?
27940.zh_title: 谁从儿童税收抵免中受益？
27940.abstract: In recent years, the Child Tax Credit (CTC) has provided a cash transfer of up to $\$2,000$ per child under age 17 to millions of families in the United States. Using the Current Population Survey, we examine the aggregate effects and distributional implications of the rules governing the credit. We focus on the rules that were in place for years prior to 2021 and that are currently scheduled to apply for years beginning in 2022. While approximately 90% of children benefit to at least some degree from the CTC, we document striking disparities in eligibility and benefits by income and race. The vast majority of children living in households in the bottom decile of the national income distribution are completely ineligible for the CTC and the majority of filers in the bottom thirty percent are eligible only for a partial credit. In contrast, virtually all children living in households in the top half of the income distribution qualify for the full credit amount. Approximately three-quarters of white, non-Hispanic and Asian children are eligible for the full CTC, compared to only about half of Black and Hispanic children. We use our results to estimate the distributional effects of a range of reforms to the CTC eligibility rules. Our results suggest that reforming the credit to include a larger share of children would more evenly distribute the credit’s benefits across children of different races and incomes.
27940.zh_abstract: 近年来，儿童税收抵免（CTC）为美国数百万家庭提供了每名17岁以下儿童最高2000美元的现金转移。利用当前人口调查数据，我们研究了管理该抵免规则的总体效应和分配影响。我们重点关注2021年之前实施且目前计划从2022年开始适用的规则。虽然约90%的儿童在某种程度上受益于CTC，但我们发现按收入和种族划分的资格和福利存在显著差异。绝大多数居住在全国收入分配底层十分位家庭的儿童完全不符合CTC资格，而底层30%收入群体中的多数申报者仅能获得部分抵免。相比之下，几乎所有居住在上半部分收入分配家庭的儿童都有资格获得全额抵免。约四分之三的非西班牙裔白人和亚裔儿童有资格获得全额CTC，而黑人和西班牙裔儿童中这一比例仅约一半。我们利用研究结果估算了多项CTC资格规则改革的分配效应。结果表明，改革抵免规则以覆盖更多儿童，将更均匀地在不同种族和收入的儿童之间分配抵免福利。

27939.title: Corporate Taxation and the Distribution of Income
27939.abstract: Higher corporate taxes reduce corporate business operations, replacing them with operations by noncorporate businesses that are risky and have undiversified ownership. This shift contributes to income dispersion, with effects so large that higher corporate taxes can increase income inequality even when the corporate tax burden falls entirely on capital owned disproportionately by the rich. Estimates suggest that the riskiness of U.S. noncorporate business increases by 12.3% the aggregate income of the top one percent, and that income dispersion created by a higher U.S. corporate tax rate offsets more than half of the distributional effects of reducing average returns to capital.
27939.zh_abstract: 更高的公司税会减少公司业务运营，取而代之的是风险较高且所有权分散的非公司企业运营。这种转变加剧了收入分散，其影响如此之大，以至于即使公司税负完全由富人不成比例拥有的资本承担，更高的公司税也可能加剧收入不平等。估计表明，美国非公司企业的风险性使最顶层1%人群的总收入增加了12.3%，而更高的美国公司税率所产生的收入分散抵消了降低资本平均回报率分配效应的一半以上。

27938.title: Highways and Globalization
27938.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Carl Kitchens, Sergey Nigai
27938.abstract: This paper quantifies the value of US highways. We develop a multisector general equilibrium model with many locations in the United States (i.e., counties) and many countries. In the model, producers choose shipping routes subject to domestic and international trade costs, endogenous congestion, and port efficiency at international transshipment points. Applying the model, we find that removing the Interstate Highway System reduces real GDP by $\$421$-$\$578$ billion. The results highlight the gains from intersectoral and international trade as well as the role of domestic transportation infrastructure in shaping regional comparative advantage.
27938.zh_abstract: 本文量化了美国高速公路的价值。我们构建了一个包含美国多个地点（即县）和多个国家的多部门一般均衡模型。在该模型中，生产者在面临国内和国际贸易成本、内生拥堵以及国际转运点港口效率的情况下选择运输路线。应用该模型，我们发现拆除州际公路系统将使实际GDP减少4210亿至5780亿美元。结果突显了部门间和国际贸易的收益，以及国内交通基础设施在塑造区域比较优势中的作用。
27938.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI；JEL：F11, F14, H54, R13, R42

27937.title: Powering Work from Home
27937.abstract: This paper documents an increase in residential electricity consumption while industrial and commercial consumption has fallen during the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States. Hourly smart meter data from Texas reveals how daily routines changed during the pandemic, with usage during weekdays closely resembling those of weekends. The 16% residential increase during work hours offsets the declines from commercial and industrial customers. Using monthly data from electric utilities nationwide, I find a 10% increase in residential consumption, and a 12% and 14% reduction in commercial and industrial usage, respectively, during the second quarter of 2020. This contrasts with the financial crisis of 2008, which also witnessed a rapid decline in industrial electricity consumption, but left residential usage unaffected. The increase in residential consumption is found to be positively associated with the share of the labor force that may work from home. From April through July of 2020, total excess expenditure on residential electricity was nearly $\$6$B.
27937.zh_abstract: 本文记录了COVID-19疫情期间美国居民用电量增加，而工业和商业用电量下降的情况。德克萨斯州的每小时智能电表数据揭示了疫情期间日常作息的变化，工作日的用电模式与周末非常相似。工作时间内居民用电量增加16%，抵消了商业和工业客户的用电量下降。利用全国电力公司的月度数据，我发现2020年第二季度居民用电量增加了10%，而商业和工业用电量分别减少了12%和14%。这与2008年金融危机形成对比，当时工业用电量也迅速下降，但居民用电量未受影响。研究发现，居民用电量的增加与可能居家办公的劳动力比例呈正相关。从2020年4月到7月，居民用电的总超额支出接近60亿美元。
27937.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IO, PE；JEL：G5, L94, Q4

27936.title: The Effects of the Affordable Care Act on the Near-Elderly: Evidence for Health Insurance Coverage and Labor Market Outcomes
27936.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》对临近退休人群的影响：健康保险覆盖与劳动力市场结果的证据
27936.authors: Mark Duggan, Gopi Shah Goda, Gina Li
27936.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) not only changed the landscape of health insurance coverage in the United States, but also affected the relationship between working decisions and health insurance. In this paper, we estimate the impact of the ACA on the near-elderly (ages 60- 64) in the five years after the implementation of its key provisions in early 2014. We exploit variation across geographic areas in the pre-existing level of uninsurance and use 65-69 year olds, whose insurance coverage was unaffected by the ACA, as a within-region control group. Our findings indicate that the ACA increased health insurance coverage among the near elderly by 4.5 percentage points and reduced their labor force participation rate by 0.6 percentage points.
27936.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》（ACA）不仅改变了美国健康保险覆盖的格局，还影响了工作决策与健康保险之间的关系。在本文中，我们估算了ACA在2014年初其主要条款实施后的五年内对临近退休人群（60-64岁）的影响。我们利用不同地理区域在ACA实施前未参保率的差异，并将保险覆盖不受ACA影响的65-69岁人群作为区域内对照组。我们的研究结果表明，ACA使临近退休人群的健康保险覆盖率提高了4.5个百分点，并使其劳动力参与率降低了0.6个百分点。
27936.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H2, H31, H51, H75, I13, J14, J21, J26

27935.title: A Q-Theory of Banks
27935.authors: Juliane Begenau, Saki Bigio, Jeremy Majerovitz, Matias Vieyra
27935.abstract: We introduce a dynamic bank theory featuring delayed loss recognition and a regulatory capital constraint, aiming to match the bank leverage dynamics captured by Tobin’s Q. We start from four facts: (1) book and market equity values diverge, especially during crises; (2) Tobin’s Q predicts future bank profitability; (3) neither book nor market leverage constraints are strictly binding for most banks; and (4) bank leverage and Tobin’s Q are mean reverting but highly persistent. We demonstrate that delayed loss accounting rules interact with bank capital requirements, introducing a tradeoff between loan growth and financial fragility. Our welfare analysis implies that accounting rules and capital regulation should optimally be set jointly. This paper emphasizes the need to reconcile regulatory dependence on book values with the market’s emphasis on fundamental values to enhance understanding of banking dynamics and improve regulatory design.
27935.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个动态银行理论，该理论包含延迟损失确认和监管资本约束，旨在匹配由托宾Q捕捉的银行杠杆动态。我们从四个事实出发：（1）账面权益与市场权益价值出现背离，尤其是在危机期间；（2）托宾Q预测银行未来盈利能力；（3）对大多数银行而言，账面和市场杠杆约束均未严格约束；（4）银行杠杆和托宾Q均值回归但高度持久。我们证明，延迟损失会计规则与银行资本要求相互作用，引入了贷款增长与金融脆弱性之间的权衡。我们的福利分析表明，会计规则和资本监管应最优地联合设定。本文强调了协调监管对账面价值的依赖与市场对基本价值的关注的必要性，以增进对银行动态的理解并改进监管设计。

27934.title: Firm Dynamics and Trade
27934.authors: George A. Alessandria, Costas Arkolakis, Kim J. Ruhl
27934.abstract: We review the literature that studies the dynamics of firms in foreign markets, both at the intensive and extensive margins, and their aggregate implications. We first summarize a set of micro facts on exporter entry, expansion, contraction, and exit and macro facts about the response of aggregate trade flows to trade-policy and business-cycle shocks. We then present the canonical model developed in the literature to account for these facts and discuss its connection to the empirical evidence. We show how three model features — future uncertain profits, an investment in market access, and high depreciation of that access upon exit — generate transition dynamics and long-run aggregate outcomes from a cut in tariffs. The model and its extensions contribute to our understanding of the dynamics of trade integration and the evolution of future trade barriers. We discuss the key challenges faced by the canonical model, possible extensions, and applications of the framework to recent global events.
27934.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究企业在国外市场动态的文献，包括集约边际和广延边际，及其总体影响。我们首先总结了关于出口企业进入、扩张、收缩和退出的微观事实，以及关于贸易流量对贸易政策和商业周期冲击反应的宏观事实。然后，我们介绍了文献中为解释这些事实而发展的经典模型，并讨论了其与经验证据的联系。我们展示了三个模型特征——未来不确定的利润、市场准入投资以及退出时该准入的高折旧——如何从关税削减中产生转型动态和长期总体结果。该模型及其扩展有助于我们理解贸易一体化的动态和未来贸易壁垒的演变。我们讨论了经典模型面临的主要挑战、可能的扩展以及该框架在近期全球事件中的应用。
27934.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F11, F12, F14, F15, F41, F61, F62

27933.title: Teenage Driving, Mortality, and Risky Behaviors
27933.zh_title: 青少年驾驶、死亡率与风险行为
27933.abstract: We investigate the effect of teenage driving on mortality and risky behaviors in the United States using a regression discontinuity design. We estimate that motor vehicle fatalities rise by 40% at the minimum legal driving age cutoff, implying a mortality risk per additional mile driven 6-9 times higher than the risk faced by adult drivers. We also find a stark 80% increase in female deaths from drug overdoses and carbon monoxide poisoning at the cutoff, caused by changes in both suicides and accidental deaths. Our analysis suggests driving regulations could be an effective tool to improve teenage health.
27933.zh_abstract: 我们利用断点回归设计研究了美国青少年驾驶对死亡率和风险行为的影响。我们估计，在法定最低驾驶年龄临界点，机动车死亡人数上升了40%，这意味着每额外行驶一英里的死亡风险是成年驾驶员所面临风险的6-9倍。我们还发现，在该临界点，女性因药物过量和一氧化碳中毒导致的死亡人数急剧增加了80%，这是由自杀和意外死亡的变化共同造成的。我们的分析表明，驾驶法规可能是改善青少年健康的有效工具。

27932.title: Did COVID-19 Market Disruptions Disrupt Food Security? Evidence from Households in Rural Liberia and Malawi
27932.zh_title: COVID-19市场混乱是否破坏了粮食安全？来自利比里亚和马拉维农村家庭的证据
27932.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
27932.abstract: We quantify the effect of market disruptions due to COVID-19 on the lives of households in rural areas of Liberia and Malawi, utilizing panel data from phone surveys that were implemented as part of a randomized cash transfer experiment. The surveys began collection several months before the pandemic and have continued throughout it. The household survey included a consistent set of internationally accepted and validated questions on food security (the household dietary diversity score, the household hunger scale, and the food consumption score). In both countries, market activity was severely disrupted and we observe large declines in income among market vendors, but we find no evidence of declines in food security for households in the short run. Even though we observe no adverse effects of the lockdowns on food security among the control group, cash transfers improved dietary quality and quantity over the low levels observed at baseline.
27932.zh_abstract: 我们利用作为随机现金转移实验一部分的电话调查面板数据，量化了COVID-19导致的市场混乱对利比里亚和马拉维农村地区家庭生活的影响。调查在大流行前几个月开始收集数据，并贯穿整个大流行期间持续进行。家庭调查包含一套国际公认且经过验证的粮食安全相关问题（家庭膳食多样性评分、家庭饥饿量表和食物消费评分）。在这两个国家，市场活动受到严重干扰，我们观察到市场摊贩的收入大幅下降，但短期内未发现家庭粮食安全下降的证据。尽管我们观察到封锁对对照组家庭的粮食安全没有不利影响，但现金转移改善了基线观察到的低水平下的膳食质量和数量。

27931.title: A q Theory of Internal Capital Markets
27931.authors: Min Dai, Xavier Giroud, Wei Jiang, Neng Wang
27931.abstract: We propose a tractable model of dynamic investment, spinoﬀs, ﬁnancing, and risk management for a multi-division ﬁrm facing costly external ﬁnance. Our main results are: (1) within-ﬁrm resource allocation is based not only on the divisions’ productivity—as in “winner picking” models—but also their risk; (2) ﬁrms may voluntarily spin oﬀ productive divisions to increase liquidity; (3) diversiﬁcation can reduce ﬁrm value in low-liquidity states; (4) corporate socialism makes liquidity less valuable; (5) division investment is determined by the ratio between marginal q and marginal value of cash. We further generalize our model to account for capital redeployability, M&As, and managerial entrenchment.
27931.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个多部门公司在面临昂贵外部融资时的动态投资、分拆、融资和风险管理的可处理模型。我们的主要结果是：（1）公司内部资源配置不仅基于各部门的生产率（如“赢家挑选”模型所述），还基于其风险；（2）公司可能自愿分拆高生产率部门以增加流动性；（3）多元化在低流动性状态下可能降低公司价值；（4）公司社会主义使流动性价值降低；（5）部门投资由边际q与现金边际价值之比决定。我们进一步将模型推广到考虑资本可重新部署性、并购和管理层固守。

27930.title: Neglected No More: Housing Markets, Mortgage Lending, and Sea Level Rise
27930.zh_title: 不再被忽视：住房市场、抵押贷款与海平面上升
27930.abstract: In this paper, we explore dynamic changes in the capitalization of sea level rise (SLR) risk in housing and mortgage markets. Our results suggest a disconnect in coastal Florida real estate: From 2013-2018, home sales volumes in the most-SLR-exposed communities declined 16-20% relative to less-SLR-exposed areas, even as their sale prices grew in lockstep. Between 2018-2020, however, relative prices in these at-risk markets finally declined by roughly 5% from their peak. Lender behavior cannot reconcile these patterns, as we show that both all-cash and mortgage-financed purchases have similarly contracted, with little evidence of increases in loan denial or securitization. We propose a demand-side explanation for our findings where prospective buyers have become more pessimistic about climate change risk than prospective sellers. The lead-lag relationship between transaction volumes and prices in SLR-exposed markets is consistent with dynamics at the peak of prior real estate bubbles.
27930.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们探讨了海平面上升风险在住房和抵押贷款市场中资本化的动态变化。我们的结果表明佛罗里达州沿海房地产存在脱节现象：从2013年到2018年，与海平面上升风险较低的地区相比，海平面上升风险最高社区的房屋销售量下降了16-20%，尽管其销售价格同步增长。然而，在2018年至2020年间，这些风险市场的相对价格最终从峰值下降了约5%。贷款人行为无法解释这些模式，因为我们显示全现金和抵押贷款融资的购买均出现类似收缩，几乎没有证据表明贷款拒绝或证券化增加。我们提出了一种需求侧解释，即潜在买家对气候变化风险的悲观程度高于潜在卖家。海平面上升风险市场中交易量与价格之间的领先-滞后关系与先前房地产泡沫高峰期的动态一致。
27930.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：G21, G22, G50, Q54, R21, R31

27929.title: De-globalization: Driven by Global Crises?
27929.zh_title: 去全球化：由全球危机驱动？
27929.abstract: International trade increased rapidly after 1990, fueled by the growth of a complex network of global value chains. Financial globalization gathered force. Trade globalization, however, reversed course since the Global Financial Crisis. The new trend is expected to endure after the Global Pandemic Crisis. There is no indication so far of significant reversal of financial globalization.
27929.zh_abstract: 国际贸易在1990年后迅速增长，受到全球价值链复杂网络发展的推动。金融全球化也日益加强。然而，自全球金融危机以来，贸易全球化趋势逆转。这一新趋势预计在全球大流行危机后仍将持续。迄今为止，没有迹象表明金融全球化出现显著逆转。

27928.title: City Limits: What do Local-Area Minimum Wages Do?
27928.zh_title: 城市界限：地方最低工资有何作用？
27928.abstract: Cities are increasingly setting their own minimum wages, and this trend has accelerated sharply in recent years. While in 2010 there were only three cities with their own minimum wages exceeding the state or federal standard, by 2020 there were 42. This new phenomenon raises the question: is it desirable to have city-level variation in minimum wage polices? We discuss the main trade-offs emerging from local variation in minimum wage polices and evaluate their empirical relevance. First, we document what type of cities raise minimum wages and we discuss how these characteristics can potentially impact the effectiveness of city-level minimum wage policies. Second, we summarize the evolving evidence on city-level minimum wage changes and provide some new evidence of our own. Early evidence suggests that the impact of the policy on wages and employment to date has been broadly similar to the evidence on state and federal-level minimum wage changes. Overall, city-level minimum wages seem to be able to tailor the policy to local economic environment without imposing substantial distortions in allocation of labor and businesses across locations.
27928.zh_abstract: 城市越来越多地设定自己的最低工资，这一趋势近年来急剧加速。2010年，只有三个城市的最低工资超过州或联邦标准，而到2020年已有42个。这一新现象引发了一个问题：城市层面的最低工资政策差异是否可取？我们讨论了地方最低工资政策差异带来的主要权衡，并评估其经验相关性。首先，我们记录了哪些类型的城市提高了最低工资，并讨论了这些特征如何可能影响城市层面最低工资政策的有效性。其次，我们总结了城市层面最低工资变化的现有证据，并提供了一些我们自己的新证据。早期证据表明，迄今为止该政策对工资和就业的影响与州和联邦层面最低工资变化的证据大致相似。总体而言，城市层面的最低工资似乎能够根据当地经济环境调整政策，而不会在劳动力和企业跨地区配置中造成重大扭曲。
27928.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J01, J18, J2, J23, J3, J31, J38, J8, J88

27927.title: Capital Flows in Risky Times: Risk-on/Risk-off and Emerging Market Tail Risk
27927.zh_title: 风险时期的资本流动：风险偏好/风险规避与新兴市场尾部风险
27927.authors: Anusha Chari, Karlye Dilts Stedman, Christian Lundblad
27927.abstract: This paper characterizes the implications of risk-on/risk-off shocks for emerging market capital flows and returns. We document that these shocks have important implications not only for the median of emerging markets flows and returns but also for the left tail. Further, while there are some differences in the effects across bond vs. equity markets and flows vs. asset returns, the effects associated with the worst realizations are generally larger than that on the median realization. We apply our methodology to the COVID-19 shock to examine the pattern of flow and return realizations: the sizable risk-off nature of this shock engenders reactions that reside deep in the left tail of most relevant emerging market quantities.
27927.zh_abstract: 本文描述了风险偏好/风险规避冲击对新兴市场资本流动和回报的影响。我们记录了这些冲击不仅对新兴市场流动和回报的中位数有重要影响，而且对左尾也有重要影响。此外，尽管债券与股票市场以及流动与资产回报之间的影响存在一些差异，但与最差实现值相关的影响通常大于中位数实现值的影响。我们将我们的方法应用于COVID-19冲击，以考察流动和回报实现值的模式：这一冲击显著的风险规避性质引发了大多数相关新兴市场数量指标深陷左尾的反应。

27926.title: Dominant Currencies: How Firms Choose Currency Invoicing and Why it Matters
27926.zh_title: 主导货币：企业如何选择发票货币及其重要性
27926.authors: Mary Amiti, Oleg Itskhoki, Jozef Konings
27926.abstract: Using new data on currency invoicing for Belgian firms, we analyze how firms make their currency choice, for both exports and imports, and the implications of this choice for exchange rate pass-through into prices and quantities. We derive our estimating equations from a theoretical framework featuring variable markups, international input sourcing, and staggered price setting with endogenous currency choice. Our structural specification provides a new test of the allocative consequences of nominal rigidities, by estimating the treatment effect of foreign-currency price stickiness on the dynamic response of prices and quantities, controlling for the endogeneity of the firm's currency choice. We show that flexible-price determinants of exchange rate pass-through are also the key firm characteristics that determine currency choice. In particular, small non-importing firms tend to price their exports in euros (producer currency) and exhibit complete exchange-rate pass-through into destination prices at all horizons. In contrast, large import-intensive firms tend to denominate their exports in foreign currencies, especially in the US dollar, exhibiting a lower pass-through of the euro-destination exchange rate and a pronounced sensitivity to the dollar-destination exchange rate. The effects of foreign-currency price stickiness are still significant beyond the one-year horizon, but gradually dissipate in the long run.
27926.zh_abstract: 利用比利时企业发票货币的新数据，我们分析了企业如何为其出口和进口做出货币选择，以及这一选择对汇率传递至价格和数量的影响。我们从包含可变加成、国际投入采购和内生货币选择下的交错定价的理论框架中推导出估计方程。我们的结构规范通过估计外币价格粘性对价格和数量动态响应的处理效应，同时控制企业货币选择的内生性，为名义刚性的配置后果提供了新的检验。我们表明，汇率传递的灵活价格决定因素也是决定货币选择的关键企业特征。特别是，小型非进口企业倾向于以欧元（生产者货币）为其出口定价，并在所有时间范围内表现出完全的汇率传递至目的地价格。相反，大型进口密集型企业倾向于以外币（尤其是美元）计价其出口，表现出较低的欧元-目的地汇率传递，并对美元-目的地汇率表现出显著的敏感性。外币价格粘性的影响在一年期之后仍然显著，但在长期逐渐消失。
27926.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, F31, F41

27925.title: Human Capital Depreciation and Returns to Experience
27925.zh_title: 人力资本折旧与经验回报
27925.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Rigissa Megalokonomou, Constantine Yannelis
27925.abstract: Human capital can depreciate if skills are unused. But estimating human capital depreciation is challenging, as worker skills are difficult to measure and less productive workers are more likely to spend time in non-employment. We overcome these challenges with new administrative data on teachers’ assignments and their students’ outcomes, and quasi-random variation from the teacher assignment process in Greece. We find significant losses to output, as a one-year increase in time without formal employment lowers students’ test scores by 0.05 standard deviations. Using a simple production model, we estimate a skill depreciation rate of 4.3% and experience returns of 6.8%.
27925.zh_abstract: 如果技能未被使用，人力资本可能会折旧。但估计人力资本折旧具有挑战性，因为工人技能难以衡量，且生产率较低的工人更可能处于非就业状态。我们利用希腊教师分配过程中教师任务和学生成果的新行政数据以及准随机变异克服了这些挑战。我们发现产出显著损失，因为非正式就业时间每增加一年，学生考试成绩下降0.05个标准差。使用一个简单的生产模型，我们估计技能折旧率为4.3%，经验回报率为6.8%。
27925.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H52, I26, J24

27924.title: Temporary Unemployment and Labor Market Dynamics During the COVID-19 Recession
27924.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退期间的临时失业与劳动力市场动态
27924.authors: Jessica Gallant, Kory Kroft, Fabian Lange, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
27924.abstract: This paper develops a search-and-matching model that incorporates temporary unemployment and applies the model to study the labor market dynamics of the COVID-19 recession in the US. We calibrate the model using panel data from the Current Population Survey for 2001-2019, and we find that the model-based job finding rates match observed job finding rates during the entire sample period and out-of-sample up through July 2020. We also find that the Beveridge curve is well-behaved and displays little change in market tightness in 2020 once we use the calibrated model to adjust for changes in the composition of the unemployed. We then use the model to project the path of unemployment over the next 18 months. Under a range of assumptions about job losses and labor demand, our model predicts a more rapid recovery compared to a model that does not distinguish between temporary and permanent unemployment and compared to professional and academic forecasts. We find that in order to rationalize the professional forecasts of the unemployment rate, some combination of the vacancy rate, job separation rate, and recall rate of workers on temporary layoff must deteriorate substantially from current levels in the next several months.
27924.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个纳入临时失业的搜索匹配模型，并将其应用于研究美国新冠疫情衰退期间的劳动力市场动态。我们利用2001-2019年当前人口调查的面板数据对模型进行校准，发现基于模型的就业率与整个样本期间及截至2020年7月的样本外观测到的就业率相匹配。我们还发现，一旦使用校准模型调整失业者构成的变化，贝弗里奇曲线表现良好，且2020年市场紧张程度变化不大。随后，我们利用该模型预测未来18个月的失业路径。在一系列关于失业和劳动力需求的假设下，我们的模型预测的复苏速度比不区分临时失业和永久失业的模型以及专业和学术预测更快。我们发现，为了合理化专业预测的失业率，未来几个月内，职位空缺率、离职率和临时解雇工人的召回率必须从当前水平大幅恶化。

27923.title: Optimal Foreign Reserves and Central Bank Policy Under Financial Stress
27923.zh_title: 金融压力下的最优外汇储备与中央银行政策
27923.abstract: We study the interaction between optimal foreign reserves accumulation and central bank international liquidity provision in a small open economy under financial stress. Firms and households finance investment and consumption by borrowing from domestic financial intermediaries (banks), which in turn borrow from abroad. Binding financial constraints can cause the domestic rate of interest to rise above the world rate and the real exchange rate to depreciate, leading to inefficiently low investment and consumption. A role then emerges for a central bank that accumulates reserves in order to provide liquidity if financial frictions bind. The optimal level of international reserves in this context depends, among other variables, on the term premium, the depth of financial markets, ex ante financial uncertainty and the precise way the central bank intervenes. The model is consistent with both the increase in international reserves observed during the period 2004-2008 and with policy intervention after the Lehman bankruptcy.
27923.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个小型开放经济体在金融压力下最优外汇储备积累与中央银行国际流动性提供之间的相互作用。企业和家庭通过向国内金融中介（银行）借款来为投资和消费融资，而银行则从国外借款。具有约束力的金融约束可能导致国内利率上升至高于世界利率，并使实际汇率贬值，从而导致投资和消费低效低下。此时，中央银行的作用显现，它积累储备以便在金融摩擦出现时提供流动性。在此背景下，最优国际储备水平取决于期限溢价、金融市场深度、事前金融不确定性以及中央银行干预的具体方式等因素。该模型既与2004-2008年期间观察到的国际储备增长一致，也与雷曼兄弟破产后的政策干预相符。

27922.title: The Rise of Income and Wealth Inequality in America: Evidence from Distributional Macroeconomic Accounts
27922.zh_title: 美国收入与财富不平等的加剧：来自分配性宏观经济账户的证据
27922.abstract: This paper studies inequality in America through the lens of distributional macroeconomic accounts—comprehensive distributions of the aggregate amount of income and wealth recorded in the official macroeconomic accounts of the United States. We use these distributional macroeconomic accounts to quantify the rise of income and wealth concentration since the late 1970s, the change in tax progressivity, and the direct redistributive effects of government intervention in the economy. Between 1978 and 2018, the share of pre-tax income earned by the top 1% rose from 10% to about 19% and the share of wealth owned by the top 0.1% rose from 7% to about 18%. In 2018, the tax system was regressive at the top end; the top 400 wealthiest Americans paid a lower average tax rate than the macroeconomic tax rate of 29%. We confront our methods and findings with those of other studies, pinpoint the areas where more research is needed, and describe how additional data collection could improve inequality measurement.
27922.zh_abstract: 本文通过分配性宏观经济账户的视角研究美国的不平等问题——这些账户提供了美国官方宏观经济账户中记录的总收入和总财富的全面分布。我们利用这些分配性宏观经济账户来量化自20世纪70年代末以来收入和财富集中度的上升、税收累进性的变化以及政府经济干预的直接再分配效应。1978年至2018年间，税前收入前1%人群的份额从10%上升到约19%，财富前0.1%人群的份额从7%上升到约18%。2018年，税收体系在顶层是累退的；最富有的400名美国人缴纳的平均税率低于29%的宏观税率。我们将我们的方法和发现与其他研究进行对比，指出需要更多研究的领域，并描述额外的数据收集如何能够改善不平等衡量。

27921.title: Trends in US Income and Wealth Inequality: Revising After the Revisionists
27921.zh_title: 美国收入与财富不平等趋势：修正后的再修正
27921.abstract: Recent studies argue that US inequality has increased less than previously thought, in particular due to a more modest rise of wealth and capital income at the top (Smith et al., 2019; Smith, Zidar and Zwick, 2020; Auten and Splinter, 2019). We examine the claims made in these papers point by point, separating genuine improvements from arguments that do not appear to us well grounded empirically or conceptually. Taking stock of this body of work, and factoring in other improvements, we provide a comprehensive update of our estimates of US income and wealth inequality. Although some of the points raised by the revisionists are valuable, the core quantitative findings of this literature do not appear to be supported by the data. The low capital share of private business income estimated in Smith et al. (2019) is not consistent with the large capital stock of these businesses. In Smith, Zidar and Zwick (2020), the interest rate assigned to the wealthy is higher than in the datasets where both income and wealth can be observed, leading to downward biased top wealth shares; capitalizing equities using almost only dividends dramatically underestimates the wealth of billionaires relative to the Forbes 400. In Auten and Splinter (2019), business profits earned by the top 1% but not taxable (due in particular to generous depreciation rules) are classified as tax evasion; tax evasion is then allocated to the bottom 99% based on an erroneous reading of random audit data. Our revised series show a rise of inequality similar to Saez and Zucman (2016) and Piketty, Saez, and Zucman (2018) while allowing for a more granular depiction of the composition of wealth and income at the top.
27921.zh_abstract: 最近的研究认为，美国不平等程度的加剧小于之前的估计，特别是由于顶层财富和资本收入的增长更为温和（Smith等人，2019；Smith, Zidar和Zwick，2020；Auten和Splinter，2019）。我们逐点审视这些论文中提出的主张，将真正的改进与那些在我们看来缺乏实证或概念依据的论点区分开来。在总结这些研究成果并纳入其他改进的基础上，我们全面更新了美国收入和财富不平等的估计。尽管修正主义者提出的一些观点具有价值，但该文献的核心量化发现似乎并未得到数据支持。Smith等人（2019）估计的私营企业资本收入份额较低，与这些企业庞大的资本存量不一致。在Smith, Zidar和Zwick（2020）中，分配给富人的利率高于能够同时观测收入和财富的数据集中的利率，导致顶层财富份额估计偏低；几乎仅使用股息对股权进行资本化，严重低估了亿万富翁相对于福布斯400榜单的财富。在Auten和Splinter（2019）中，前1%人群赚取但因慷慨的折旧规则等原因而无需纳税的企业利润被归类为逃税；然后，基于对随机审计数据的错误解读，这些逃税被分配给底层99%的人群。我们修正后的序列显示，不平等的上升幅度与Saez和Zucman（2016）以及Piketty, Saez和Zucman（2018）的估计相似，同时允许对顶层财富和收入的构成进行更细致的描述。

27920.title: Anxiety or Pain? The Impact of Tariffs and Uncertainty on Chinese Firms in the Trade War
27920.zh_title: 焦虑还是痛苦？关税与不确定性对贸易战中中国企业的影响
27920.authors: Felipe Benguria, Jaerim Choi, Deborah L. Swenson, Mingzhi Xu
27920.abstract: The unexpected outbreak of the U.S.-China trade war led to dramatic increases in the import and export tariffs confronting Chinese firms. Due to firm-level differences in trade engagement, customs trade data combined with tariff changes allow us to measure firm-level exposure to the trade war. Further, by adopting a new textual analysis approach to listed firms' annual reports, we develop trade policy uncertainty (TPU) measures that vary over firms and time. Our difference-in-differences examination of these firm-level data reveals that trade war increases in U.S. tariffs and Chinese retaliatory tariffs both raised Chinese firms’ TPU. The impact of tariffs on uncertainty is heterogeneous, and is most pronounced for smaller and less capital-intensive firms. This effect is also smaller for Chinese exporters that were more diversified in terms of partner countries. In the second stage of our analysis we explore and document the negative connection between Chinese firm-level increases in TPU and subsequent firm performance. Our estimates indicate that Chinese firms hit by a one standard deviation increase in TPU during the trade war reduced firm-level investment, R&D expenditures, and profits by 1.4, 2.7, and 8.9 percent, respectively.
27920.zh_abstract: 中美贸易战的意外爆发导致中国企业面临的进出口关税大幅增加。由于企业在贸易参与度上存在差异，结合关税变化的海关贸易数据使我们能够衡量企业在贸易战中的暴露程度。此外，通过对上市公司年报采用新的文本分析方法，我们构建了随企业和时间变化的贸易政策不确定性（TPU）指标。我们对这些企业层面数据进行双重差分检验，发现贸易战中美国关税和中国报复性关税的增加都提高了中国企业的TPU。关税对不确定性的影响具有异质性，对规模较小和资本密集度较低的企业最为显著。对于出口目的国更加多元化的中国出口商，这种影响也较小。在分析的第二阶段，我们探索并记录了中国企业层面TPU上升与后续企业绩效之间的负相关关系。我们的估计表明，在贸易战期间受到TPU一个标准差增加冲击的中国企业，其投资、研发支出和利润分别下降了1.4%、2.7%和8.9%。

27919.title: The Rise and Fall of Import Substitution
27919.abstract: In the 1950s, many economists believed that import substitution – policies to restrict imports of manufactured goods – was the best trade strategy to promote industrialization and economic growth in developing countries. By the mid-1960s, there was widespread disenchantment with the results of such policies, even among its proponents. This paper traces the rise and fall of import substitution as a development idea. Perhaps surprisingly, early advocates of import substitution were quite cautious in their support for the policy and were also among the first to question it based on evidence derived from country experiences.
27919.zh_abstract: 在20世纪50年代，许多经济学家认为进口替代——即限制制成品进口的政策——是发展中国家促进工业化和经济增长的最佳贸易战略。到20世纪60年代中期，即使在其支持者中，也对这类政策的结果普遍感到失望。本文追溯了进口替代作为一种发展理念的兴衰。或许令人惊讶的是，进口替代的早期倡导者对该政策的支持相当谨慎，并且也是最早基于国家经验证据对其提出质疑的人之一。
27919.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI；JEL：B27, B31, F13, F14, O14, O19, O24

27918.title: Ethnographic and Field Data in Historical Economics
27918.zh_title: 历史经济学中的人种志与实地数据
27918.abstract: This chapter will cover recent research in historical economics that uses ethnographic data and data from surveys and lab experiments. The study of historical economics, particularly outside of non-Western countries, has been constrained by availability of historical data. However, recent work incorporates data and tools from other fields and sub-fields to fill this gap. For example, economists are increasingly taking advantage of ethnographic data sets compiled by anthropologists. There is also growing interest in the use of original survey data collection both within and across countries and lab-in-the-field experiments to answer questions on culture and institutions. Often, these tools are used together to provide complementary evidence on the question of interest. These sources of data have been particularly important for research on areas where there is limited historical data, and they have increased the scope of questions that can be examined. This chapter will overview these recent developments and highlight the benefits of these diverse methodologies and data sources.
27918.zh_abstract: 本章将涵盖近期使用人种志数据以及调查和实验室实验数据的历史经济学研究。历史经济学的研究，尤其是在非西方国家之外，一直受到历史数据可得性的限制。然而，近期的工作整合了其他领域和子领域的数据与工具来填补这一空白。例如，经济学家越来越多地利用人类学家编制的人种志数据集。同时，对于使用国内外原始调查数据收集以及实地实验来回答文化和制度问题的兴趣也在增长。通常，这些工具被结合使用，以提供关于研究问题的互补性证据。这些数据来源对于历史数据有限的领域的研究尤为重要，并且它们扩大了可研究问题的范围。本章将概述这些最新发展，并强调这些多样化方法和数据来源的优势。

27917.title: The Micro Anatomy of Macro Consumption Adjustments
27917.zh_title: 宏观消费调整的微观解剖
27917.authors: Rafael Guntin, Pablo Ottonello, Diego Perez
27917.abstract: We study crises characterized by large adjustments of aggregate consumption through their microlevel patterns. We show that leading theories designed to explain aggregate consumption dynamics differ markedly in their cross-sectional predictions. While theories based on financial frictions predict that rich households with liquid assets should be able to smooth consumption during bad times, neoclassical theories predict that these agents would optimally adjust their consumption if crises severely affect their permanent income. Using microlevel data on several episodes of large aggregate-consumption adjustment, we document that rich households significantly adjust consumption relative to their income, consistent with the permanent-income hypothesis of consumption during crises. We discuss our findings' implications for the effectiveness of stabilization policies that target consumption during crises.
27917.zh_abstract: 我们通过微观层面的模式来研究以总消费大幅调整为特征的危机。我们表明，旨在解释总消费动态的主要理论在其横截面预测上存在显著差异。基于金融摩擦的理论预测，拥有流动资产的富裕家庭应该能够在经济不景气时平滑消费，而新古典理论则预测，如果危机严重影响了这些经济主体的永久收入，他们将最优地调整消费。利用多次总消费大幅调整事件的微观数据，我们记录了富裕家庭相对于其收入显著调整消费的情况，这与危机期间消费的永久收入假说一致。我们讨论了我们的发现对于旨在危机期间针对消费的稳定政策有效性的启示。
27917.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E60, F41, F44

27916.title: Research Funding and Collaboration
27916.authors: Benjamin Davies, Jason Gush, Shaun C. Hendy, Adam B. Jaffe
27916.abstract: We analyse whether research funding contests promote co-authorship. Our analysis combines Scopus publication records with data on applications to the Marsden Fund, the premiere source of funding for basic research in New Zealand. On average, and after controlling for observable and unobservable heterogeneity, applicant pairs were 13.8 percentage points more likely to co-author in a given year if they co-proposed during the previous ten years than if they did not. This co-authorship rate was not significantly higher among funded pairs. However, when we increase post-proposal publication lags towards the length of a typical award, we find that funding, rather than participation, promotes co-authorship.
27916.zh_abstract: 我们分析了研究资助竞赛是否促进了合著关系。我们的分析将Scopus出版记录与新西兰基础研究首要资金来源——马斯登基金的申请数据相结合。平均而言，在控制了可观测和不可观测的异质性后，如果申请者配对在过去十年内共同提出过项目，他们在给定年份内合著的可能性比未共同提出项目的配对高出13.8个百分点。在获得资助的配对中，这一合著率并未显著更高。然而，当我们延长申请后出版时滞至典型资助周期长度时，我们发现是资助本身而非参与行为促进了合著。

27915.title: Firm-Embedded Productivity and Cross-Country Income Differences
27915.zh_title: 企业嵌入生产率与跨国收入差异
27915.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Javier Cravino, Natalia Ramondo
27915.abstract: We measure the contribution of firm-embedded productivity to cross-country income differences. By firm-embedded productivity we refer to the components of productivity that differ across firms and that can be transferred internationally, such as blueprints, management practices, and intangible capital. Our approach relies on microlevel data on the cross-border operations of multinational enterprises (MNEs). We compare the market shares of the exact same MNE in different countries and document that they are about four times larger in developing than in high-income countries. This finding indicates that MNEs face less competition in less-developed countries, suggesting that firm-embedded productivity in those countries is scarce. We propose and implement a new measure of firm-embedded productivity based on this observation. We find a strong positive correlation between our measure and output per-worker across countries. In our sample, differences in firm-embedded productivity account for roughly a third of the cross-country variance in output per-worker.
27915.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了企业嵌入生产率对跨国收入差异的贡献。所谓企业嵌入生产率，指的是在不同企业间存在差异且可在国际间转移的生产率组成部分，例如蓝图、管理实践和无形资本。我们的方法依赖于跨国企业跨境运营的微观层面数据。我们比较了同一家跨国企业在不同国家的市场份额，并发现其在发展中国家的市场份额约为高收入国家的四倍。这一发现表明，跨国企业在欠发达国家面临的竞争较少，暗示这些国家的企业嵌入生产率较为稀缺。基于这一观察，我们提出并实施了一种新的企业嵌入生产率衡量指标。我们发现，各国间该指标与人均产出之间存在强烈的正相关关系。在我们的样本中，企业嵌入生产率的差异解释了大约三分之一的国家间人均产出差异。

27914.title: The Domestic Political-Economy of the WTO Crisis: Lessons for Preserving Multilateralism
27914.zh_title: WTO危机的国内政治经济学：维护多边主义的教训
27914.abstract: A major contributor to the crisis at the World Trade Organization (WTO) is the decline in support for multilateralism in the United States. Three key problems with WTO design precipitated the decline. First, incomplete rules related to trade remedies are interpreted by the WTO’s Appellate Body (AB) in ways that conflict with a narrow set of sensitive US domestic priorities. Second, existing WTO rules do not sufficiently account for non-market economies, such as China. Third, remediation of these problems is infeasible due to consensus-based decision-making in the WTO. These problems represent more fundamental challenges induced by increased economic integration—loss of sovereignty and erosion of democracy. To alleviate these problems in multilateral agreements we suggest: 1) a narrow solution that carves out a special process for handling trade remedy disputes; 2) a broad solution that relaxes the requirement of consensus for WTO reform, adopting some form of supermajority voting or a sunset clause; 3) the reform of domestic consensus-building institutions within the US that directly address the political-economy sources of voter discontent.
27914.zh_abstract: 世界贸易组织危机的一个主要促成因素是美国对多边主义支持度的下降。WTO设计的三个关键问题导致了这种下降。首先，与贸易救济相关的不完整规则被WTO上诉机构以与美国少数敏感国内优先事项相冲突的方式解释。其次，现有WTO规则未能充分考虑非市场经济体，例如中国。第三，由于WTO基于共识的决策机制，解决这些问题不可行。这些问题代表了经济一体化加深所引发的更根本性挑战——主权丧失和民主侵蚀。为了缓解多边协议中的这些问题，我们建议：1）一个狭窄的解决方案，即设立一个处理贸易救济争端的特殊程序；2）一个广泛的解决方案，即放宽WTO改革的共识要求，采用某种形式的超级多数投票或日落条款；3）改革美国国内的共识构建机构，直接解决选民不满的政治经济根源。
27914.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LE, POL；JEL：A11, F02, F13, F5, F51, F52, F53, F55, F6, H1, H4, K12, K33

27913.title: Introducing CogX: A New Preschool Education Program Combining Parent and Child Interventions
27913.zh_title: 引入CogX：一种结合家长与儿童干预的新型学前教育项目
27913.authors: Roland G. Fryer Jr, Steven D. Levitt, John A. List, Anya Samek
27913.abstract: We present the results of a novel early childhood intervention in which disadvantaged 3-4-year- old children were randomized to receive a new preschool and parent education program focused on cognitive and non-cognitive skills (CogX) or to a control group that did not receive preschool education. In addition to a typical academic year (9 month) program, we also evaluated a shortened summer version of the program (2 months) in which children were treated immediately prior to the start of Kindergarten. Both programs, including the shortened version, significantly improved cognitive test scores by about one quarter of a standard deviation relative to the control group at the end of the year. The shortened version of the program was equally as effective as the academic- year program because most of the gains in the academic-year program occurred within the first few months.
27913.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项新颖的早期儿童干预结果，其中处于不利地位的3-4岁儿童被随机分配接受一个专注于认知和非认知技能的新型学前教育和家长教育项目，或进入未接受学前教育的对照组。除了典型的学年项目外，我们还评估了一个缩短的暑期版本，在该版本中，儿童在幼儿园入学前立即接受干预。两个项目，包括缩短版本，在学年结束时均显著提高了认知测试分数，相对于对照组提高了约四分之一个标准差。缩短版本的项目与学年项目同样有效，因为学年项目的大部分收益发生在最初几个月内。

27912.title: Liquidity Requirements, Free-Riding, and the Implications for Financial Stability Evidence from the early 1900s
27912.zh_title: 流动性要求、搭便车行为及其对金融稳定的影响——来自20世纪初的证据
27912.abstract: Maintaining sufficient liquidity in the financial system is vital for its stability. However, since returns on liquid assets are typically low, individual financial institutions may seek to hold fewer such assets, especially if they believe they can rely on other institutions for liquidity support. We examine whether state banks in the early 1900s took advantage of relatively high cash balances maintained by national banks, due to reserve requirements, to hold less cash themselves. We find that state banks did hold less cash in places where both state legal requirements were lower and national banks were more prevalent.
27912.zh_abstract: 在金融体系中维持充足的流动性对其稳定性至关重要。然而，由于流动性资产的回报通常较低，个别金融机构可能寻求持有更少的此类资产，特别是当它们认为可以依赖其他机构提供流动性支持时。我们考察了20世纪初的州银行是否利用国民银行因准备金要求而维持的相对较高现金余额，来减少自身持有的现金。我们发现，在州法律要求较低且国民银行更为普遍的地方，州银行确实持有更少的现金。

27911.title: Covid-19 and the U.S. Safety Net
27911.zh_title: 新冠疫情与美国的保障网
27911.authors: Robert A. Moffitt, James P. Ziliak
27911.abstract: We examine trends in employment, earnings, and incomes over the last two decades in the United States, and how the safety net has responded to changing fortunes, including the shutdown of the economy in response to the Covid-19 Pandemic. The U.S. safety net is a patchwork of different programs providing in-kind as well as cash benefits and had many holes prior to the Pandemic. In addition, few of the programs are designed explicitly as automatic stabilizers. We show that the safety net response to employment losses in the Covid-19 Pandemic largely consists only of increased support from unemployment insurance and food assistance programs, which did not replace the lost income for many households. We discuss possible options to reform social assistance in America that may provide more robust income floors in times of economic downturns.
27911.zh_abstract: 我们考察了过去二十年美国就业、收入和所得的趋势，以及保障网如何应对经济形势的变化，包括为应对新冠疫情而实施的经济停摆。美国的保障网是由提供实物和现金福利的不同项目拼凑而成的，在疫情之前就存在许多漏洞。此外，很少有项目被明确设计为自动稳定器。我们表明，保障网对新冠疫情中就业损失的应对主要仅包括来自失业保险和食品援助项目的支持增加，这并未弥补许多家庭失去的收入。我们讨论了改革美国社会救助的可能选项，这些选项可能在经济低迷时期提供更坚实的收入底线。

27910.title: Firm Input Choice Under Trade Policy Uncertainty
27910.zh_title: 贸易政策不确定性下的企业投入选择
27910.authors: Kyle Handley, Nuno Limão, Rodney D. Ludema, Zhi Yu
27910.abstract: We examine the role of trade policy uncertainty in shaping the import decisions of firms. If the adoption of a new input requires a sunk cost investment, then the prospect of price increases in that input, e.g. due to trade barriers, reduces the adoption of that input (a substitution effect) and possibly other inputs (complementarity via lower profits). Thus trade policy uncertainty can affect a firm’s entire input mix. We provide a new model of input price uncertainty that captures both effects and derive its empirical implications. We test these using an important episode that lowered input price uncertainty: China’s accession to the WTO and the associated commitment to bind its import tariffs. We estimate large increases in imported inputs by firms from accession; the reduced uncertainty from commitment generates substitution effects larger than the reductions in applied tariffs in 2000-2006 and has significant profit effects.
27910.zh_abstract: 我们考察了贸易政策不确定性在塑造企业进口决策中的作用。如果采用一种新投入品需要沉没成本投资，那么该投入品价格（例如由于贸易壁垒）上涨的前景会减少对该投入品的采用（替代效应），并可能减少其他投入品的采用（通过降低利润产生的互补效应）。因此，贸易政策不确定性可以影响企业的整个投入组合。我们提供了一个新的投入品价格不确定性模型，该模型捕捉了这两种效应，并推导出其经验含义。我们利用一个降低了投入品价格不确定性的重要事件——中国加入WTO及其约束进口关税的相关承诺——来检验这些含义。我们估计，企业因加入WTO而大幅增加了进口投入品；来自承诺的不确定性降低所产生的替代效应大于2000-2006年实际关税削减的效应，并产生了显著的利润效应。
27910.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F02, F1, F12, F13, F14, F61, O19, O24

27973.title: Social Finance
27973.abstract: We review an empirical literature that studies the role of social interactions in driving economic and financial decision making. We first summarize recent work that documents an important role of social interactions in explaining household decisions in housing and mortgage markets. This evidence shows, for example, that there are large peer effects in mortgage refinancing decisions and that individuals' beliefs about the attractiveness of housing market investments are affected by the recent house price experiences of their friends. We also summarize the evidence that social interactions affect the stock market investments of both retail and professional investors as well as household financial decisions such as retirement savings, borrowing, and default. Along the way, we describe a number of easily accessible recent data sets for the study of social interactions in finance, including the "Social Connectedness Index," which measures the frequency of Facebook friendship links across geographic regions. We conclude by outlining several promising directions for further research at the intersection of household finance and "social finance."
27973.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究社会互动在驱动经济和金融决策中作用的实证文献。我们首先总结了近期的工作，这些工作记录了社会互动在解释住房和抵押贷款市场中的家庭决策方面的重要作用。例如，这些证据表明，抵押贷款再融资决策中存在显著的同伴效应，并且个人对住房市场投资吸引力的信念受到其朋友近期房价经历的影响。我们还总结了社会互动影响散户和专业投资者的股票市场投资，以及退休储蓄、借贷和违约等家庭财务决策的证据。在此过程中，我们描述了一些近期易于获取的用于研究金融中社会互动的数据集，包括“社会关联指数”，该指数衡量了跨地理区域的Facebook好友链接频率。最后，我们概述了在家庭金融和“社会金融”交叉领域进一步研究的几个有前景的方向。

27972.title: Civil Liberties in Times of Crisis
27972.authors: Marcella Alsan, Luca Braghieri, Sarah Eichmeyer, Minjeong Joyce Kim, Stefanie Stantcheva, David Y. Yang
27972.abstract: Major crises — from terrorist attacks to epidemic outbreaks — bring the trade-off between individual civil liberties and societal well-being into sharp relief. In this paper, we study how willing citizens are to restrict civil liberties to improve public health conditions in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic. We design and conduct representative surveys involving approximately 550,000 responses across 15 countries, including China and the United States, during many months of the COVID-19 pandemic, from March 2020 until January 2021. We document significant heterogeneity across countries and demographic groups in willingness to sacrifice rights for public welfare. Citizens disadvantaged by income, education, or race are less willing to sacrifice rights than their more advantaged peers in every country, as are those with prior experience in communist regimes. Leveraging naturally occurring variation as well as experimental approaches, we estimate that a one standard deviation increase in health security concerns increases willingness to sacrifice civil liberties by approximately 68%-83% of the difference between the average Chinese and U.S. citizen. Stated preferences correlate with observed behavior including demand for tracing apps, donations, and petitions.
27972.zh_abstract: 重大危机——从恐怖袭击到疫情爆发——使个人公民自由与社会福祉之间的权衡变得尤为突出。本文以COVID-19疫情为背景，研究公民在多大程度上愿意限制公民自由以改善公共卫生状况。我们设计并实施了具有代表性的调查，覆盖15个国家约55万份回复，包括中国和美国，时间跨度为2020年3月至2021年1月疫情期间的多个月份。我们记录了不同国家和人口群体在牺牲权利以换取公共福利意愿上的显著异质性。在每个国家，收入、教育或种族方面处于劣势的公民比其优势群体更不愿意牺牲权利，有共产主义政权经历的人也是如此。利用自然发生的变化以及实验方法，我们估计健康安全担忧每增加一个标准差，牺牲公民自由的意愿大约会增加相当于中国和美国公民平均差异的68%-83%。陈述的偏好与观察到的行为相关，包括对追踪应用程序、捐款和请愿的需求。

27971.title: An Analysis of the Performance of Target Date Funds
27971.zh_title: 目标日期基金绩效分析
27971.authors: John B. Shoven, Daniel B. Walton
27971.abstract: This paper presents a thorough evaluation of target date funds for the period 2010-2020. These funds have grown enormously in assets, reaching $\$1.4$ trillion by the end of 2019. They account for approximately 24 percent of all of the assets in 401(k) accounts. The paper reports on the results of a style analysis evaluation of TDFs which results in their effective asset allocation. It examines the constant in the style analysis regressions which reflects the over- or under-performance of the funds relative to a passive benchmark with the same asset allocation. Lower cost TDFs tend to match the benchmark, whereas higher cost TDFs deviate considerably from theirs. We examine how TDFs performed in the stock market crash between 2/19/20 and 3/23/20. In this five week period, broad market averages fell by about one-third. We find that the value of long-dated TDFs (those with a target date of 2045 and beyond) fell by between 30 and 35 percent, whereas the 2025 funds, designed for people roughly 60 years old, lost between 20 and 25 percent of their value. We find that past performance only weakly influences future expected performance. As with equity funds in general in this period, TDFs with actively managed ingredient funds, on average, trailed the performance of their cheaper passively managed counterparts.
27971.zh_abstract: 本文对2010-2020年期间的目标日期基金进行了全面评估。这些基金的资产规模大幅增长，截至2019年底达到1.4万亿美元，约占所有401(k)账户资产的24%。本文报告了对目标日期基金进行风格分析评估的结果，该评估得出了其有效资产配置。它考察了风格分析回归中的常数项，该常数项反映了基金相对于具有相同资产配置的被动基准的超越或落后表现。低成本的目标日期基金往往与基准相匹配，而高成本的目标日期基金则与其基准存在显著偏差。我们研究了目标日期基金在2020年2月19日至3月23日股市崩盘期间的表现。在这五周内，广泛市场平均指数下跌了约三分之一。我们发现，长期目标日期基金（目标日期为2045年及以后）的价值下跌了30%至35%，而针对大约60岁人群设计的2025年基金则损失了20%至25%的价值。我们发现，过去的表现对未来预期表现的影响很弱。与这一时期的一般股票基金一样，拥有主动管理成分基金的目标日期基金，平均而言，其表现落后于更便宜的被动管理同类基金。

27970.title: Imposing Policy on Reluctant Actors: The Hospital Desegregation Campaign and Black Postneonatal Mortality in the Deep South
27970.zh_title: 对不情愿行为者施加政策：南方腹地的医院废除种族隔离运动与黑人产后新生儿死亡率
27970.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Daniel I. Rees
27970.abstract: In 1966, Southern hospitals were barred from participating in Medicare unless they discontinued their longstanding practice of racial segregation. Using data from five Deep South states and exploiting county-level variation in Medicare certification dates, we find that gaining access to an ostensibly integrated hospital had no effect on Black postneonatal mortality. Similarly, there is little evidence that the campaign contributed to the trend towards in-hospital births among Southern Black mothers. These results are consistent with descriptions of the hospital desegregation campaign as producing only cosmetic changes and illustrate the limits of anti-discrimination policies imposed upon reluctant actors.
27970.zh_abstract: 1966年，南方医院被禁止参与医疗保险，除非它们停止长期以来的种族隔离做法。利用五个南方腹州的数据，并利用县级医疗保险认证日期的差异，我们发现，获得表面上一体化医院的机会对黑人产后新生儿死亡率没有影响。同样，几乎没有证据表明这场运动促进了南方黑人母亲在医院分娩的趋势。这些结果与将医院废除种族隔离运动描述为仅产生表面变化的描述一致，并说明了强加于不情愿行为者的反歧视政策的局限性。

27969.title: Millionaires Speak: What Drives Their Personal Investment Decisions?
27969.zh_title: 百万富翁之言：什么驱动他们的个人投资决策？
27969.authors: Svetlana Bender, James J. Choi, Danielle Dyson, Adriana Z. Robertson
27969.abstract: We survey 2,484 U.S. individuals with at least $\$1$ million of investable assets about how well leading academic theories describe their financial beliefs and personal investment decisions. The wealthy’s beliefs about financial markets and the economy are surprisingly similar to those of the average U.S. household, but the wealthy are less driven by discomfort with the market, financial constraints, and labor income considerations. Portfolio equity share is most affected by professional advice, time until retirement, personal experiences, rare disaster risk, and health risk. Concentrated equity holding is most often motivated by belief that the stock has superior risk-adjusted returns. Beliefs about how expected returns vary with stock characteristics frequently differ from historical relationships, and more risk is not always associated with higher expected returns. Active equity fund investment is most motivated by professional advice and the expectation of higher average returns. Berk and Green (2004) rationalize return chasing in the absence of fund performance persistence by positing that past returns reveal managerial skill but there are diminishing returns to scale in active management. Forty-two percent of respondents agree with the first assumption, 33% with the second, and 19% with both.
27969.zh_abstract: 我们调查了2484名拥有至少100万美元可投资资产的美国个人，了解领先的学术理论在多大程度上描述了他们的金融信念和个人投资决策。富人对金融市场和经济的信念与普通美国家庭惊人地相似，但富人较少受到市场不适感、财务约束和劳动收入考虑的影响。投资组合股权比例受专业建议、退休时间、个人经历、罕见灾难风险和健康风险的影响最大。集中持股最常受到股票具有优越风险调整后回报这一信念的驱动。关于预期回报如何随股票特征变化的信念经常与历史关系不同，并且更多风险并不总是与更高预期回报相关。主动型股票基金投资最受专业建议和对更高平均回报的预期驱动。Berk和Green（2004）通过假设过去回报揭示了管理技能，但主动管理存在规模报酬递减，从而在没有基金业绩持续性的情况下合理化追逐回报的行为。42%的受访者同意第一个假设，33%同意第二个，19%同意两者。

27968.title: Wealth Mobility in the 1860s
27968.abstract: We offer new evidence on the regional dynamics of wealth holding in the United States over the Civil War decade based on a hand-linked random sample of wealth holders drawn from the 1860 census. Despite the wealth shock caused by emancipation, we find that patterns of wealth mobility were broadly similar for northern and southern residents in 1860. Looking at the determinants of individual wealth holding in 1870, we find that the elasticity with respect to 1860 wealth was quite low in both regions—consistent with high levels of wealth mobility.
27968.zh_abstract: 我们基于从1860年人口普查中手工链接的财富持有者随机样本，提供了关于美国内战十年期间财富持有区域动态的新证据。尽管解放奴隶造成了财富冲击，我们发现1860年南方和北方居民的财富流动模式大致相似。考察1870年个人财富持有的决定因素，我们发现相对于1860年财富的弹性在两个地区都相当低——这与高水平的财富流动性一致。

27967.title: Historical Data: Where to Find Them, How to Use Them
27967.zh_title: 历史数据：在哪里找到它们，如何使用它们
27967.abstract: The use of historical data has become a standard tool in economics, serving three main purposes: to examine the influence of the past on current economic outcomes; to use unique natural experiments to test modern economic theories; and to use modern economic theories to refine our understanding of important historical events. In this chapter, we provide a comprehensive analysis of the types of historical data most commonly used in economic research and discuss a variety of issues that they raise, such as the constant change in national and administrative borders; the reshuffling of ethnic groups due to migration, colonialism, natural disasters, and many other forces. We also point out which methodological advances allow economists to overcome or minimize these problems.
27967.zh_abstract: 历史数据的使用已成为经济学中的标准工具，服务于三个主要目的：考察过去对当前经济结果的影响；利用独特的自然实验检验现代经济理论；以及利用现代经济理论深化我们对重要历史事件的理解。在本章中，我们全面分析了经济研究中最常用的历史数据类型，并讨论了它们引发的各种问题，例如国家和行政边界的不断变化；由于移民、殖民主义、自然灾害和许多其他力量导致的族群重组。我们还指出了哪些方法论进步使经济学家能够克服或最小化这些问题。

27966.title: Post COVID-19 Exit Strategies and Emerging Markets Economic Challenges
27966.zh_title: 后COVID-19退出策略与新兴市场经济挑战
27966.abstract: We outline two divergent exit strategies of the U.S. from the post COVID-19 debt-overhang, and analyze their implications on Emerging Markets and global stability. The first strategy is the U.S. aiming at returning to the 2019, pre-COVID mode of loose fiscal policy and accommodating monetary policy. The short-term benefits of this strategy include faster economic growth as long as the snowball effect – the difference between the interest rate on public debt and the growth rate – is negative. This strategy may entail a growing tail risk of a deeper crisis triggered by a future reversal of the snowball effect, inducing a deeper future sudden stop crises and instability of Emerging Markets. We illustrate this scenario by evaluating Emerging Markets’ lost growth decade during the 1980s, triggered by the massive reversal of the snowball effect in the U.S. during 1974-1984. The second strategy entails a two-pronged approach. First, turning U.S. fiscal priorities from fighting COVID’s medical and economic challenges, towards investment in social, medical and physical infrastructures. Second, with a lag, promoting a gradual fiscal adjustment aiming at reaching overtime primary-surpluses and debt resilience. We illustrate this scenario by reviewing the exit strategy of the U.S. post-WWII, and its repercussions on the ‘Phoenix Emergence’ of Western Europe and Japan from WWII destruction. The contrast between the two exit strategies suggests that the two-pronged approach is akin to an upfront investment in greater long-term global stability. We also empirically show how lowering the cost of serving public debt has been associated with higher real output growth.
27966.zh_abstract: 我们概述了美国摆脱后COVID-19债务积压的两种不同退出策略，并分析了它们对新兴市场和全球稳定的影响。第一种策略是美国旨在回归2019年COVID前的宽松财政政策和适应性货币政策模式。这种策略的短期好处包括更快的经济增长，只要滚雪球效应——公共债务利率与增长率之差——为负。这种策略可能伴随着日益增长的尾部风险，即未来滚雪球效应逆转引发的更深层次危机，导致新兴市场未来更严重的突然停止危机和不稳定。我们通过评估1980年代新兴市场失去的十年增长来说明这一情景，该情景由1974-1984年间美国滚雪球效应的大规模逆转引发。第二种策略涉及双管齐下的方法。首先，将美国的财政优先事项从抗击COVID的医疗和经济挑战转向对社会、医疗和实体基础设施的投资。其次，在滞后一段时间后，推动逐步的财政调整，目标是逐步实现基本盈余和债务韧性。我们通过回顾美国二战后退出策略及其对西欧和日本从二战破坏中“凤凰崛起”的影响来说明这一情景。两种退出策略的对比表明，双管齐下的方法类似于对更大长期全球稳定的前期投资。我们还实证展示了降低公共债务服务成本如何与更高的实际产出增长相关联。

27965.title: What Explains Temporal and Geographic Variation in the Early US Coronavirus Pandemic?
27965.zh_title: 什么解释了美国早期冠状病毒大流行的时间和地理差异？
27965.authors: Hunt Allcott, Levi Boxell, Jacob C. Conway, Billy A. Ferguson, Matthew Gentzkow, Benjamin Goldman
27965.abstract: We provide new evidence on the drivers of the early US coronavirus pandemic. We combine an epidemiological model of disease transmission with quasi-random variation arising from the timing of stay-at-home-orders to estimate the causal roles of policy interventions and voluntary social distancing. We then relate the residual variation in disease transmission rates to observable features of cities. We estimate significant impacts of policy and social distancing responses, but we show that the magnitude of policy effects is modest, and most social distancing is driven by voluntary responses. Moreover, we show that neither policy nor rates of voluntary social distancing explain a meaningful share of geographic variation. The most important predictors of which cities were hardest hit by the pandemic are exogenous characteristics such as population and density.
27965.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于美国早期冠状病毒大流行驱动因素的新证据。我们将疾病传播的流行病学模型与居家令时间安排产生的准随机变化相结合，以估计政策干预和自愿社交距离的因果作用。然后，我们将疾病传播率的残差变化与城市的可观测特征联系起来。我们估计了政策和社交距离反应的显著影响，但我们表明政策效应的幅度是适度的，并且大多数社交距离是由自愿反应驱动的。此外，我们表明，政策和自愿社交距离率都不能解释地理差异的重要部分。哪些城市受疫情影响最严重的最重要预测因素是人口和密度等外生特征。

27964.title: How Did Depositors Respond to COVID-19?
27964.authors: Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Mingzhu Tai, Wensi Xie
27964.abstract: Why did banks experience massive deposit inflows during the first months of the pandemic? Using weekly branch-level data on interest rates and county-level data on COVID-19 cases, we discover that interest rates at bank branches in counties with higher COVID-19 infection rates fell by more than rates at other branches—even branches of the same bank in different counties. When differentiating weeks by the degree of stock market distress and counties by the likely impact of COVID-19 cases on economic anxiety, the evidence suggests that the deposit inflows were triggered by a surge in the supply of precautionary savings.
27964.zh_abstract: 为什么银行在疫情最初几个月经历了大规模存款流入？利用每周分行层面的利率数据和县级COVID-19病例数据，我们发现，COVID-19感染率较高县的银行分行利率下降幅度大于其他分行——即使是同一银行在不同县的分行。在区分股市困境程度不同的周次以及COVID-19病例对经济焦虑可能影响不同的县时，证据表明存款流入是由预防性储蓄供给激增引发的。

27963.title: The Economic Case for Protecting Biodiversity
27963.zh_title: 保护生物多样性的经济理由
27963.abstract: This paper summarizes in non-technical terms the economic case for conserving biodiversity, and explains why we cannot rely on market forces to do this task. It reviews the policy interventions that could help in biodiversity conservation.
27963.zh_abstract: 本文以非技术性术语总结了保护生物多样性的经济理由，并解释了为什么我们不能依赖市场力量来完成这一任务。它回顾了可能有助于生物多样性保护的政策干预措施。

27962.title: Sparse Network Asymptotics for Logistic Regression under Possible Misspecification
27962.zh_title: 可能误设下逻辑回归的稀疏网络渐近性
27962.abstract: Consider a bipartite network where N consumers choose to buy or not to buy M different products.
