This paper considers the properties of the logit fit of the N ×M array of “i-buys-j” purchase decisions, Y = [Yij ]1≤i≤N,1≤j≤M, onto a vector of known functions of consumer and product attributes under asymptotic sequences where (i) both N and M grow large, (ii) the average number of products purchased per consumer is finite in the limit, (iii) there exists dependence across elements in the same row or same column of Y (i.e., dyadic dependence) and (iv) the true conditional probability of making a purchase may, or may not, take the assumed logit form. Condition (ii) implies that the limiting network of purchases is sparse: only a vanishing fraction of all possible purchases are actually made. Under sparse network asymptotics, I show that the parameter indexing the logit approximation solves a particular Kullback–Leibler Information Criterion (KLIC) minimization problem (defined with respect to a certain Poisson population). This finding provides a simple characterization of the logit pseudo-true parameter under general misspecification. With respect to sampling theory, sparseness implies that the first and last terms in an extended Hoeffding-type variance decomposition of the score of the logit pseudo composite log-likelihood are of equal order. In contrast, under dense network asymptotics, the last term is asymptotically negligible. Asymptotic normality of the logistic regression coefficients is shown using a martingale central limit theorem (CLT) for triangular arrays. Unlike in the dense case, the normality result derived here also holds under degeneracy of the network graphon. Relatedly, when there “happens to be” no dyadic dependence in the dataset in hand, it specializes to recently derived results on the behavior of logistic regression with rare events and iid data. Simulation results suggest that sparse network asymptotics better approximate the finite network distribution of the logit estimator.
27962.zh_abstract: 考虑一个二分网络，其中N个消费者选择购买或不购买M种不同产品。本文研究了将N×M的“i购买j”购买决策数组Y = [Yij]1≤i≤N,1≤j≤M对消费者和产品属性已知函数向量进行逻辑拟合的性质，在渐近序列下：(i) N和M都变大，(ii) 每个消费者平均购买的产品数量在极限中是有限的，(iii) Y的同一行或同一列元素之间存在依赖（即二元依赖），(iv) 购买的真实条件概率可能或可能不采用假设的逻辑形式。条件(ii)意味着购买的限制网络是稀疏的：只有极小比例的所有可能购买实际发生。在稀疏网络渐近性下，我表明索引逻辑近似的参数解决了特定的Kullback-Leibler信息准则（KLIC）最小化问题（相对于某个泊松总体定义）。这一发现为一般误设下的逻辑伪真实参数提供了简单刻画。关于抽样理论，稀疏性意味着逻辑伪复合对数似然得分的扩展Hoeffding型方差分解中的第一项和最后一项具有相同阶数。相比之下，在密集网络渐近性下，最后一项渐近可忽略。使用三角阵列的鞅中心极限定理（CLT）证明了逻辑回归系数的渐近正态性。与密集情况不同，这里导出的正态性结果在网络图函数退化时也成立。相关地，当手头数据集中“恰好没有”二元依赖时，它专门适用于最近关于稀有事件和独立同分布数据下逻辑回归行为的结果。模拟结果表明，稀疏网络渐近性更好地逼近了逻辑估计量的有限网络分布。
27962.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C31, C33, C55

27961.title: Elections, Political Polarization, and Economic Uncertainty
27961.zh_title: 选举、政治两极分化与经济不确定性
27961.authors: Scott R. Baker, Aniket Baksy, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Jonathan A. Rodden
27961.abstract: We examine patterns of economic policy uncertainty (EPU) around national elections in 23 countries. Uncertainty shows a clear tendency to rise in the months leading up to elections. Average EPU values are 13% higher in the month of and the month prior to an election than in other months of the same national election cycle, conditional on country effects, time effects, and country-specific time trends. In a closer examination of U.S. data, EPU rises by 28% in the month of presidential elections that are close and polarized, as compared to elections that are neither. This pattern suggests that the 2020 US Presidential Election could see a large rise in economic policy uncertainty. It also suggests larger spikes in uncertainty around future elections in other countries that have experienced rising polarization in recent years.
27961.zh_abstract: 我们考察了23个国家全国选举前后经济政策不确定性（EPU）的模式。不确定性在选举前几个月明显趋于上升。在控制国家效应、时间效应和国家特定时间趋势后，选举当月和前一月的平均EPU值比同一国家选举周期其他月份高13%。在对美国数据的更仔细研究中，与既不接近也不两极分化的选举相比，在接近且两极分化的总统选举当月，EPU上升28%。这一模式表明，2020年美国总统选举可能导致经济政策不确定性大幅上升。这也表明，近年来两极分化加剧的其他国家未来选举中，不确定性可能出现更大峰值。

27960.title: Efficiency Wages, Unemployment, and Environmental Policy
27960.zh_title: 效率工资、失业与环境政策
27960.abstract: We study the incidence of pollution taxes and their impact on unemployment in an analytical general equilibrium efficiency wage model. We find closed-form solutions for the effect of a pollution tax on unemployment, factor prices, and output prices, and we identify and isolate different channels through which these general equilibrium effects arise. An effect arising from the efficiency wage specification depends on the form of the workers' effort function. Numerical simulations further illustrate our results and show that this efficiency wage effect can fully offset the sources-side incidence results found in models that omit it.
27960.zh_abstract: 我们在一个分析性一般均衡效率工资模型中研究了污染税的归宿及其对失业的影响。我们找到了污染税对失业、要素价格和产出价格影响的闭式解，并识别和隔离了这些一般均衡效应产生的不同渠道。来自效率工资设定的效应取决于工人努力函数的形式。数值模拟进一步说明了我们的结果，并表明这种效率工资效应可以完全抵消忽略它的模型中发现的需求侧归宿结果。

27959.title: Liquidity and Volatility
27959.authors: Itamar Drechsler, Alan Moreira, Alexi Savov
27959.abstract: Liquidity provision is a bet against private information: if private information turns out to be higher than expected, liquidity providers lose. Since information generates volatility, and volatility co-moves across assets, liquidity providers have a negative exposure to aggregate volatility shocks. As aggregate volatility shocks carry a very large premium in option markets, this negative exposure can explain why liquidity provision earns high average returns. We show this by incorporating uncertainty about the amount of private information into an otherwise standard model. We test the model in the cross section of short-term reversals, which mimic the portfolios of liquidity providers. As predicted by the model, reversals have large negative betas to aggregate volatility shocks. These betas explain their average returns with the same risk price as in option markets, and their predictability by VIX in the time series. Volatility risk thus explains the liquidity premium among stocks and why it increases in volatile times. Our results provide a novel view of the risks and returns to liquidity provision.
27959.zh_abstract: 流动性提供是对私人信息的押注：如果私人信息高于预期，流动性提供者就会亏损。由于信息产生波动性，且波动性跨资产共同变动，流动性提供者对总体波动性冲击具有负向敞口。由于总体波动性冲击在期权市场中带有非常大的溢价，这种负向敞口可以解释为什么流动性提供能获得高平均回报。我们通过将私人信息量的不确定性纳入一个原本标准的模型来展示这一点。我们在短期反转的横截面上测试模型，这些反转模仿了流动性提供者的投资组合。正如模型预测的那样，反转对总体波动性冲击具有大的负贝塔值。这些贝塔值用与期权市场相同的风险价格解释了它们的平均回报，以及它们在时间序列上被VIX预测的特性。因此，波动性风险解释了股票中的流动性溢价以及为什么它在波动时期增加。我们的结果为流动性提供的风险和回报提供了新视角。

27958.title: Bottom-up Markup Fluctuations
27958.authors: Ariel Burstein, Vasco M. Carvalho, Basile Grassi
27958.abstract: We study markup cyclicality in a granular macroeconomic model with oligopolistic competition. We first characterize how firm, sectoral, and aggregate markups comove with output at different levels of aggregation in response to firm-level shocks. We then quantify the model’s ability to reproduce salient features of the cyclical properties of measured markups in French administrative firm-level data from the bottom (firm) level to the aggregate level. We document that (i) firm-level markups rise with market share and sector-level markups with concentration, (ii) the relationship between markups and sectoral output varies by firm size—negative for small firms but positive for large ones, (iii) sector-level markups move positively with sectoral output, and (iv) sectoral markups show no systematic relationship with aggregate output. Our model helps rationalize these seemingly conflicting patterns of markup cyclicality in the data.
27958.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有寡头竞争的宏观经济学模型中的加成周期性。我们首先刻画了在应对企业层面冲击时，企业、部门和总体加成如何在不同加总水平上与产出共同变动。然后，我们量化了模型再现法国行政企业层面数据中从底层（企业）到总体层面测量加成的周期性特征显著特点的能力。我们记录了：(i) 企业层面加成随市场份额上升，部门层面加成随集中度上升，(ii) 加成与部门产出的关系因企业规模而异——对小企业为负，但对大企业为正，(iii) 部门层面加成与部门产出正相关，(iv) 部门加成与总体产出没有系统关系。我们的模型有助于合理化数据中这些看似矛盾的加成周期性模式。

27957.title: Offshoring and Inflation
27957.authors: Diego A. Comin, Robert C. Johnson
27957.abstract: Did trade integration suppress inflation? Conventional wisdom says yes, based on the disinflationary supply-side impacts of trade. These supply-side arguments are incomplete however, because trade dynamics also influence aggregate demand. We analyze how trade dynamics shape inflation in New Keynesian models, depending on whether trade is changing for inputs versus final goods, whether shocks are anticipated versus unanticipated, and whether they are transitory versus persistent. Specifically, we stress that anticipated and persistent increases in future trade raise inflation today. Consistent with this channel, we show that inflation increases before and after countries adopt free trade agreements, which contain news about future increases in trade. Embedding this mechanism into extended models with pro-competitive and distributional effects of trade, we find that rising trade in the United States led to higher inflation between 1995 and 2010, with a reversal thereafter as trade integration stalled.
27957.zh_abstract: 贸易一体化抑制了通货膨胀吗？传统观点认为是的，基于贸易的供给侧通缩影响。然而，这些供给侧论点是不完整的，因为贸易动态也影响总需求。我们分析了贸易动态如何在新凯恩斯模型中塑造通货膨胀，取决于贸易是投入品还是最终品的变化，冲击是预期的还是非预期的，以及它们是暂时的还是持久的。具体来说，我们强调，未来贸易的预期和持久增加会提高今天的通货膨胀。与这一渠道一致，我们表明通货膨胀在各国采用自由贸易协定（包含未来贸易增加的新闻）前后上升。将这一机制嵌入具有贸易的促进竞争和分配效应的扩展模型中，我们发现美国不断增长的贸易在1995年至2010年间导致了更高的通货膨胀，此后随着贸易一体化停滞而逆转。
27957.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E5, F1, F15, F4, F6

27956.title: (S)Cars and the Great Recession
27956.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Kieran P. Larkin, Morten O. Ravn, Mario Padula
27956.abstract: US households’ consumption and car purchases collapsed during the Great Recession, for reasons that are still poorly understood. In this paper we use the Consumer Expenditure Survey to derive cohort and business cycle decompositions of consumption profiles. When decomposing the car expenditure data into its extensive and intensive margins, we find that the intensive margin contracted sharply in the Great Recession, a finding in stark contrast to conventional wisdom and to the experience of prior recessions. We interpret the evidence through the prism of a very rich life-cycle model where individuals are subject to idiosyncratic uninsurable income shocks, aggregate income shocks, wealth shocks, and credit shocks. We show that, because of their salience and the transaction costs, cars are particularly sensitive to changes in the perception of fu- ture expected income and its variability. We find that on top of a large aggregate income shock, life-cycle income profile shocks and wealth shocks are important determinants of consumption choices during the Great Recession.
27956.zh_abstract: 在大衰退期间，美国家庭的消费和汽车购买量大幅下降，其原因至今仍不明确。本文利用消费者支出调查数据，对消费概况进行了队列分解和商业周期分解。在将汽车支出数据分解为广延边际和集约边际时，我们发现集约边际在大衰退中急剧收缩，这一发现与传统观点以及以往衰退的经验形成鲜明对比。我们通过一个非常丰富的生命周期模型来解读这些证据，在该模型中，个体面临特殊的不可保险的收入冲击、总体收入冲击、财富冲击和信贷冲击。我们表明，由于汽车的显著性和交易成本，汽车对未来预期收入及其波动性的感知变化特别敏感。我们发现，除了巨大的总体收入冲击外，生命周期收入概况冲击和财富冲击也是大衰退期间消费选择的重要决定因素。

27955.title: Misallocation and Capital Market Integration: Evidence From India
27955.zh_title: 资源错配与资本市场一体化：来自印度的证据
27955.abstract: We show that foreign capital liberalization reduces capital misallocation and increases aggregate productivity for affected industries in India. The staggered liberalization of access to foreign capital across disaggregated industries allows us to identify changes in firms' input wedges, overcoming major challenges in the measurement of the effects of changing misallocation. Liberalization increases capital overall. For domestic firms with initially high marginal revenue products of capital (MRPK), liberalization increases revenues by 23%, physical capital by 53%, wage bills by 28%, and reduces MRPK by 33% relative to low MRPK firms. The effects of liberalization are largest in areas with less developed local banking sectors, indicating that inefficiencies in that sector may cause misallocation. Finally, we propose an assumption under which a novel method exploiting natural experiments can be used to bound the effect of changes in misallocation on treated industries' aggregate productivity. These industries' Solow residual increases by 3–16%.
27955.zh_abstract: 我们表明，外国资本自由化减少了印度受影响行业的资本错配，并提高了总体生产率。跨细分行业的外国资本准入的错开自由化使我们能够识别企业投入楔子的变化，克服了衡量错配变化影响的主要挑战。自由化总体上增加了资本。对于最初资本边际收益产品（MRPK）较高的国内企业，相对于低MRPK企业，自由化使收入增加23%，实物资本增加53%，工资支出增加28%，并使MRPK降低33%。自由化的影响在地方银行部门欠发达的地区最大，表明该部门的低效率可能导致资源错配。最后，我们提出一个假设，在此假设下，可以利用一种利用自然实验的新方法来界定错配变化对受处理行业总体生产率的影响。这些行业的索洛残差增加了3-16%。
27955.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IFM；JEL：F21, F38, F6, O1, O11, O12, O4

27954.title: Economic Adjustment during the Great Recession: The Role of Managerial Quality
27954.zh_title: 大衰退期间的经济调整：管理质量的作用
27954.authors: Gilbert Cette, Jimmy Lopez, Jacques Mairesse, Giuseppe Nicoletti
27954.abstract: This study investigates empirically how managerial practices have affected macroeconomic adjustment during the Great Recession after the 2008 economic crisis. We use the local projection method pioneered by Jordà (2005) on a country x industry balanced panel data over the 2007-2015 period for eighteen industries in ten OECD countries. We find that, in countries where management quality is higher, production and employment are more resilient during the Great Recession. Moreover, this effect on resilience is stronger for industries deeply affected by the 2008 crisis and goes with wage moderation as well as an unchanged labor share.
27954.zh_abstract: 本研究实证调查了管理实践如何影响2008年经济危机后大衰退期间的宏观经济调整。我们使用Jordà（2005）开创的局部投影方法，对2007-2015年期间十个OECD国家十八个行业的面板数据进行分析。我们发现，在管理质量较高的国家，生产率和就业在大衰退期间更具韧性。此外，这种对韧性的影响在受2008年危机影响严重的行业中更为显著，并且伴随着工资适度增长和劳动份额不变。

27953.title: Externalities as Arbitrage
27953.abstract: How can we assess whether macro-prudential regulations are having their intended effects? If these regulations are optimal, their marginal benefit of addressing externalities should equal their marginal cost of distorting risk-sharing. These risk-sharing distortions will manifest as trading opportunities that intermediaries are unable to exploit. Focusing in particular on arbitrage opportunities, I construct an “externality-mimicking portfolio” whose returns track the externalities that would rationalize existing regulations as optimal. I conduct a revealed-preference exercise using this portfolio and test whether the recovered externalities are sensible. I find that the signs of existing CIP violations are inconsistent with optimal policy.
27953.zh_abstract: 我们如何评估宏观审慎监管是否达到了预期效果？如果这些监管是最优的，那么它们解决外部性的边际收益应该等于扭曲风险分担的边际成本。这些风险分担扭曲将表现为中介机构无法利用的交易机会。特别关注套利机会，我构建了一个“模仿外部性的投资组合”，其回报追踪那些能够使现有监管合理化为最优的外部性。我利用这个投资组合进行了一项显示性偏好检验，并检验恢复出的外部性是否合理。我发现，现有货币基差套利（CIP）违背的迹象与最优政策不一致。

27952.title: How Do CEOs Make Strategy?
27952.authors: Mu-Jeung Yang, Michael Christensen, Nicholas Bloom, Raffaella Sadun, Jan Rivkin
27952.abstract: We explore the critical question of how executives make strategic decisions. Utilizing a new survey of 262 CEO alumni of Harvard Business School, we gather evidence on four aspects of each executive’s business strategy: its overall structure, its formalization, its development, and its implementation. We report three key results. First, different CEOs use markedly different processes to make strategic decisions; some follow highly formalized, rigorous, and deliberate processes, while others rely heavily on instinct and intuition. Second, more structured strategy processes are associated with larger firm size and faster employment growth. Third, using a regression discontinuity centered around a change in the curriculum of Harvard Business School’s required strategy course, we trace differences in strategic decision making back to differences in managerial education.
27952.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了高管如何制定战略决策这一关键问题。利用对262位哈佛商学院CEO校友的新调查，我们收集了每位高管商业战略四个方面的证据：总体结构、正式化程度、制定过程以及实施情况。我们报告了三个关键结果。首先，不同的CEO使用截然不同的流程来制定战略决策；有些人遵循高度正式化、严谨和深思熟虑的流程，而另一些人则严重依赖本能和直觉。其次，更结构化的战略流程与更大的企业规模和更快的就业增长相关。第三，利用围绕哈佛商学院必修战略课程大纲变化的断点回归，我们将战略决策的差异追溯到管理教育的差异。

27951.title: Uncertainty, Wages, and the Business Cycle
27951.zh_title: 不确定性、工资与经济周期
27951.abstract: We show that limited wage flexibility in economic downturns generates strong and state-dependent amplification of uncertainty shocks. It also explains the cyclical behavior of empirical measures of uncertainty. Central to our analysis is the existence of matching frictions in the labor market and an occasionally binding constraint on downward wage adjustment. The wage constraint enhances the concavity of firms' hiring rule, generating an endogenous profit-risk premium. In turn, uncertainty shocks increase the profit-risk premium when the economy operates close to the wage constraint. This implies that higher uncertainty can severely deepen a recession, although its impact is weaker on average. Non-linear local projections and VAR estimates support the model predictions. Additionally, the variance of the unforecastable component of future economic outcomes always increases at times of low economic activity. Thus, measured uncertainty rises in a recession even in the absence of uncertainty shocks.
27951.zh_abstract: 我们表明，经济衰退时期有限的工资灵活性会产生强烈且状态依赖的不确定性冲击放大效应。这也解释了不确定性经验测量指标的周期性行为。我们分析的核心是劳动力市场中存在匹配摩擦以及一个偶尔具有约束力的工资向下调整约束。工资约束增强了企业雇佣规则的凹性，产生了内生的利润风险溢价。反过来，当经济接近工资约束运行时，不确定性冲击会增加利润风险溢价。这意味着更高的不确定性可能会严重加深衰退，尽管其平均影响较弱。非线性局部投影和VAR估计支持了模型预测。此外，未来经济结果中不可预测成分的方差总是在经济活动低迷时期增加。因此，即使没有不确定性冲击，测量的不确定性也会在衰退中上升。

27950.title: How to Talk When a Machine is Listening?: Corporate Disclosure in the Age of AI
27950.zh_title: 当机器在听时如何说话？：人工智能时代的企业信息披露
27950.authors: Sean Cao, Wei Jiang, Baozhong Yang, Alan L. Zhang
27950.abstract: Growing AI readership, proxied by expected machine downloads, motivates firms to prepare filings that are friendlier to machine parsing and processing. Firms avoid words that are perceived as negative by computational algorithms, as compared to those deemed negative only by dictionaries meant for human readers. The publication of Loughran and McDonald (2011) serves as an instrumental event attributing the difference-in-differences in the measured sentiment to machine readership. High machine-readership firms also exhibit speech emotion assessed as embodying more positivity and excitement by audio processors. This is the first study exploring the feedback effect on corporate disclosure in response to technology.
27950.zh_abstract: 日益增长的AI读者群（以预期的机器下载量为代表）激励企业准备更有利于机器解析和处理的文件。与仅针对人类读者的词典所认为的负面词汇相比，企业会避免使用被计算算法视为负面的词汇。Loughran和McDonald（2011）的发表作为一个工具性事件，将测量情绪的双重差分归因于机器读者群。高机器读者群的企业还表现出语音情感，音频处理器认为其体现了更多的积极性和兴奋感。这是首次探索企业信息披露对技术反馈效应的研究。

27949.title: The Political Economics of Non-democracy
27949.zh_title: 非民主制度的政治经济学
27949.abstract: We survey recent theoretical and empirical literature on political economics of non-democracies. Dictators face many challenges to their rule: internal, such as palace coups or breakdown of their support coalition, or external, such as mass protests or revolutions. We analyze strategic decisions made by dictators — hiring political loyalists to positions that require competence, restricting media freedom at the cost of sacrificing bureaucratic efficiency, running a propaganda campaign, organizing electoral fraud, purging associates and opponents, and repressing citizens — as driven by the desire to maximize the regime's chances of staying in power. We argue that the key to understanding the functioning and ultimately the fate of a nondemocratic regime is the information flows within the regime, and the institutions that govern these information flows.
27949.zh_abstract: 我们综述了关于非民主制度政治经济学的近期理论和实证文献。独裁者面临许多对其统治的挑战：内部挑战，如宫廷政变或支持联盟的瓦解；外部挑战，如大规模抗议或革命。我们分析了独裁者做出的战略决策——将政治忠诚者任命到需要能力的职位、以牺牲官僚效率为代价限制媒体自由、开展宣传运动、组织选举舞弊、清洗同僚和反对者以及镇压公民——这些决策都源于最大化政权继续掌权机会的愿望。我们认为，理解非民主制度运作及其最终命运的关键在于政权内部的信息流动，以及管理这些信息流动的制度。
27949.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：C73, D72, D74, D82, D83, P16

27948.title: Moneyball in Medicare: Heterogeneous Treatment Effects
27948.zh_title: 医疗领域的“点球成金”：异质性处理效应
27948.authors: Edward C. Norton, Emily J. Lawton, Jun Li
27948.abstract: One of the most important changes to the United States health care system over the last two decades is the emergence of pay-for-performance as a way to encourage hospitals and other providers to improve quality of care. Unlike fee-for-service, these value-based purchasing programs measure aspects of quality and financially reward hospitals that are outstanding or at least improving in their care. Prior research has shown that hospitals often improve more when the marginal financial incentives are larger. However, the exact relationship between marginal financial incentives and year-over-year improvement in measures remains unclear. In this study, we use national 20152018 data on approximately 2,700 hospitals to estimate how hospitals respond to pay-for-performance incentives in the Hospital Value-Based Purchasing (HVBP) Program. We show that this relationship is non-linear, has strong serial correlation, is somewhat similar for safety-net hospitals as non-safety-net hospitals, and is proportional to the size of the Medicare patient population.
27948.zh_abstract: 过去二十年间，美国医疗体系最重要的变革之一，是“按绩效付费”作为鼓励医院及其他医疗服务提供者提升护理质量的方式而兴起。与按服务收费不同，这些基于价值的采购项目会衡量护理质量的多个维度，并对表现卓越或至少有所改善的医院给予经济奖励。先前的研究表明，当边际经济激励更大时，医院的改善幅度通常也更大。然而，边际经济激励与护理质量指标逐年改善之间的确切关系仍不明确。在本研究中，我们利用2015年至2018年全国约2700家医院的数据，估算医院如何对医院基于价值采购（HVBP）项目中的按绩效付费激励做出反应。我们发现，这种关系是非线性的，具有较强的序列相关性，在安全网医院与非安全网医院之间有一定相似性，并且与医疗保险患者群体的规模成正比。

27947.title: Overreaction and Working Memory
27947.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Spencer Yongwook Kwon, Augustin Landier, Yueran Ma, David Thesmar
27947.abstract: We study how biases in expectations vary across different settings, through a large-scale randomized experiment where participants forecast stable random processes. The experiment allows us to control the data generating process and the participants’ relevant information sets, so we can cleanly measure forecast biases. We find that forecasts display significant overreaction to the most recent observation. Moreover, overreaction is especially pronounced for less persistent processes and longer forecast horizons. We also find that commonly-used expectations models do not easily account for the variation in overreaction across settings. We provide a theory of expectations formation with imperfect utilization of past information. Our model closely fits the empirical findings.
27947.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项大规模随机实验来研究预期偏差在不同情境下如何变化，参与者在该实验中预测稳定的随机过程。该实验使我们能够控制数据生成过程以及参与者的相关信息集，从而能够清晰地衡量预测偏差。我们发现，预测对最新观测值表现出显著的过度反应。此外，对于持续性较弱的过程和更长的预测期限，过度反应尤为明显。我们还发现，常用的预期模型难以轻易解释不同情境下过度反应的变化。我们提出了一种预期形成理论，该理论涉及对过去信息的不完全利用。我们的模型与实证结果高度吻合。

27946.title: Estimating the Costs of Filing Tax Returns and the Potential Savings from Policies Aimed at Reducing These Costs
27946.zh_title: 估算报税成本及旨在降低这些成本的政策所带来的潜在节省
27946.abstract: This paper estimates the cost of filing taxes and assesses several policy proposals aimed at reducing these costs. Using US tax returns, a quasi-experimental method and additional extrapolations based on survey evidence, I uncover three main findings. First, filing costs are large and have been steadily increasing over time. Second, part of this increase in filing costs can be attributed to an increase in the number of schedules filed per taxpayer. Third, pre-populating tax returns and offering free filing options can result in substantial cost savings for taxpayers.
27946.zh_abstract: 本文估算了报税成本，并评估了几项旨在降低这些成本的政策提案。利用美国纳税申报表、一种准实验方法以及基于调查证据的额外推断，我发现了三个主要结论。第一，报税成本高昂，并且随着时间的推移持续上升。第二，报税成本上升的部分原因可归因于每位纳税人提交的附表数量增加。第三，预填纳税申报表并提供免费报税选项可以为纳税人带来可观的成本节省。

27999.title: The Long-Run Effects of the Affordable Care Act: A Pre-Committed Research Design Over the COVID-19 Recession and Recovery
27999.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》的长期效应：跨越COVID-19衰退与复苏的预先承诺研究设计
27999.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
27999.abstract: The long-run costs and benefits of social insurance expansions may not be realized until a program has been in place through a cycle of boom, bust, and recovery. In the case of the Affordable Care Act (ACA), the arrival of the program's inaugural bust and recovery have been hastened by the COVID-19 pandemic. In this context, our analysis begins by developing two facts. First, during the pre-pandemic boom, we show that the ACA's effects had largely stabilized by 2016. Second, we develop a new fact involving variations in the ACA's effects across industries. Specifically, we show that the ACA’s effects differed dramatically across industries with lower versus higher levels of pre-ACA insurance coverage, and that this difference cannot be explained by differences in workers’ incomes or other observable characteristics, nor by geographic differences in pre-ACA uninsured rates. Finally, we set the stage for pre-committed analyses of the ACA's effects over the remainder of the current cycle of boom, bust, and recovery. In so doing, we seek to advance the use of pre-committed research designs in observational settings.
27999.zh_abstract: 社会保险扩张的长期成本和收益可能直到一个项目经历了繁荣、萧条和复苏的完整周期后才能显现。就《平价医疗法案》（ACA）而言，该法案首次萧条和复苏的到来因COVID-19疫情而加速。在此背景下，我们的分析首先确立了两个事实。首先，在疫情前的繁荣期，我们表明ACA的影响到2016年已基本稳定。其次，我们发展了一个新事实，涉及ACA影响在不同行业间的差异。具体来说，我们表明ACA的影响在ACA前保险覆盖率较低与较高的行业之间存在显著差异，并且这种差异无法用工人收入或其他可观测特征的差异来解释，也无法用ACA前未参保率的地理差异来解释。最后，我们为在当前繁荣、萧条和复苏周期的剩余阶段对ACA影响进行预先承诺分析奠定了基础。通过这样做，我们旨在推动在观察性环境中使用预先承诺研究设计。

27998.title: Does Context Outweigh Individual Characteristics in Driving Voting Behavior? Evidence from Relocations within the U.S.
27998.zh_title: 情境因素是否比个人特征更能驱动投票行为？来自美国境内迁移的证据
27998.abstract: We measure the overall influence of contextual versus individual factors (e.g., voting rules and media as opposed to race and education) on voter behavior, and explore underlying mechanisms. Using a U.S.-wide voter-level panel, 2008–18, we examine voters who relocate across state and county lines, tracking changes in registration, turnout, and party affiliation to estimate location and individual fixed effects in a value-added model. Location explains 37 percent of the cross-state variation in turnout (to 63 percent for individual characteristics) and an only slightly smaller share of variation in party affiliation. Place effects are larger for young and White voters.
27998.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了情境因素与个人因素（例如，投票规则和媒体相对于种族和教育）对选民行为的总体影响，并探讨了潜在机制。利用2008-2018年全美选民层面面板数据，我们考察了跨州和县界迁移的选民，追踪其登记、投票率和党派归属的变化，在增值模型中估计地点和个人的固定效应。地点解释了投票率跨州变异的37%（个人特征解释63%），并解释了略小份额的党派归属变异。地点效应在年轻选民和白人选民中更大。

27997.title: An Executive Order Worth $100 Billion: The Impact of an Immigration Ban’s Announcement on Fortune 500 Firms’ Valuation
27997.zh_title: 价值1000亿美元的行政令：移民禁令公告对财富500强企业估值的影响
27997.authors: Dany Bahar, Prithwiraj Choudhury, Britta Glennon
27997.abstract: On June 22, 2020, President Trump issued an Executive Order (EO) that suspended new work visas, barring nearly 200,000 foreign workers and their dependents from entering the United States and preventing American companies from hiring skilled immigrants using H-1B or L1 visas. Exploiting this shock, and using event study methodology analyzing the cumulative average abnormal returns (CAARs) of Fortune 500 companies following this order, we find that the EO statistically and economically significantly caused negative CAARs of up to 0.45%, the equivalent of over 100 billion of US dollars of losses, based on the firms’ valuation before the event. Our results are particularly pronounced for firms that had maintained or increased their reliance on skilled immigrant workers over the prior years.
27997.zh_abstract: 2020年6月22日，特朗普总统发布了一项行政令，暂停新的工作签证，禁止近20万名外国工人及其家属进入美国，并阻止美国公司使用H-1B或L1签证雇佣技术移民。利用这一冲击，并采用事件研究方法分析该行政令后财富500强企业的累计平均异常回报率（CAARs），我们发现该行政令在统计和经济上均显著导致了高达0.45%的负向CAARs，相当于基于事件前企业估值的超过1000亿美元的损失。我们的结果在那些过去几年维持或增加了对技术移民工人依赖的企业中尤为显著。

27996.title: Lead in Drinking Water and Birth Outcomes: A Tale of Two Water Treatment Plants
27996.zh_title: 饮用水中的铅与出生结局：两个水处理厂的故事
27996.abstract: The recent lead-in-water crisis in Newark has renewed concerns about the crisis being a widespread problem in the nation. Using data on the exact home addresses of pregnant women residing in the city combined with information on the spatial boundary separating areas within the city serviced by two water treatment plants, we exploit an exogenous change in water chemistry that resulted in lead leaching into the tap water of one plant's service area, but not the other's, to identify a causal effect of prenatal lead exposure on fetal health. We find robust evidence of adverse health impacts, which has important policy implications in light of the substantial number of lead water pipes that remain in use as part of our aging infrastructure and the cost-benefit calculus of lead abatement interventions.
27996.zh_abstract: 近期纽瓦克的饮用水铅污染危机再次引发担忧，即此类危机可能成为全国范围内的普遍问题。利用居住在该市的孕妇确切家庭住址数据，结合该市两个水处理厂服务区域的空间分界信息，我们利用水化学变化的外生冲击——该变化导致其中一个水处理厂服务区的自来水铅浸出，而另一个则未受影响——来识别产前铅暴露对胎儿健康的因果效应。我们发现了健康不良影响的稳健证据，鉴于我们老化的基础设施中仍有大量铅水管在使用，以及铅减排干预措施的成本效益计算，这一发现具有重要的政策意义。
27996.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I18, Q53, Q58

27995.title: Disentangling Motivation and Study Productivity as Drivers of Adolescent Human Capital Formation: Evidence from a Field Experiment and Structural Analysis
27995.zh_title: 区分动机和学习生产力作为青少年人力资本形成的驱动因素：来自实地实验和结构分析的证据
27995.authors: Christopher Cotton, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Joseph Price, Sutanuka Roy
27995.abstract: We estimate a structural model of endogenous short-run human capital investment focusing on a learner’s leisure-study choices, influenced by external costs/benefits and two key internal factors: learning productivity and willingness to engage in study activity. Our novel self-investment framework rigorously quantifies models of learning that have existed in the psychology literature for decades. Our identification strategy combines panel data and study-incentive variation to point identify student-level parameters. Empirically, we find that idiosyncratic productivity and motivation traits are uncorrelated, and that low productivity is the stronger predictor of academic struggles, not low motivation. We investigate the influence of external factors on student learning and find that school quality affects it through 3 channels: augmenting productivity, augmenting skill production TFP, and by altering the mapping between learning activity and permanent skill gains.
27995.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个内生短期人力资本投资的结构模型，重点关注学习者的休闲-学习选择，该选择受外部成本/收益以及两个关键内部因素影响：学习生产力和参与学习活动的意愿。我们的新颖自我投资框架严格量化了心理学文献中已存在数十年的学习模型。我们的识别策略结合面板数据和学习激励变化，以点识别学生层面的参数。实证发现，特质性的生产力和动机特征不相关，且低生产力是学业困难更强的预测因素，而非低动机。我们研究了外部因素对学生学习的影响，发现学校质量通过三个渠道发挥作用：提高生产力、提高技能生产全要素生产率，以及改变学习活动与永久技能增益之间的映射关系。
27995.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：C93, I21, I24, I25, I26, J01, J24, O38

27994.title: Granular Credit Risk
27994.authors: Sigurd Galaasen, Rustam Jamilov, Ragnar Juelsrud, Hélène Rey
27994.abstract: What is the impact of granular credit risk on banks and the economy? We quantify single-name exposure risk in bank portfolios by applying a novel empirical strategy to an administrative loan-level dataset from Norway. Exploiting the fat-tailed properties of the loan-share distribution, we use the granular instrumental variable approach to show that idiosyncratic borrower risk survives aggregation within banks’ portfolios. These granular credit shocks spill over from affected banks to firms, reducing investment and raising default risk among non-granular borrowers, with sizeable consequences for the real economy.
27994.zh_abstract: 颗粒信用风险对银行和经济有何影响？我们通过将一种新颖的实证策略应用于挪威的行政贷款层面数据集，量化了银行投资组合中的单一名称敞口风险。利用贷款份额分布的厚尾特性，我们采用颗粒工具变量方法表明，异质性借款人的风险在银行投资组合内的加总过程中得以幸存。这些颗粒信用冲击从受影响的银行溢出到企业，减少了投资并提高了非颗粒借款人的违约风险，对实体经济产生了相当大的影响。

27993.title: The Risk of Narrow, Disputable Results in the U.S. Electoral College: 1836-2020
27993.zh_title: 美国选举团中狭窄、可争议结果的风险：1836-2020年
27993.abstract: Close elections are important for many reasons, including that consequent election disputes can weaken democratic legitimacy and risk political violence. We quantify the probability of close outcomes in US presidential races with novel applications of empirical election models from several sources. We show that razor-thin margins are very likely under the Electoral College (EC). And we establish that the EC causes this closeness: It would not occur under any plausibly comparable popular vote system. The tendency of the EC to generate close elections is true today and throughout US presidential voting history.
27993.zh_abstract: 势均力敌的选举之所以重要，原因众多，包括由此引发的选举争议可能削弱民主合法性并带来政治暴力风险。我们通过新颖地应用来自多个来源的实证选举模型，量化了美国总统选举中出现接近结果的可能性。我们表明，在选举团制度下，极其微弱的优势非常可能出现。并且我们证实，这种接近性是由选举团制度造成的：在任何合理可比的大众投票制度下都不会出现这种情况。选举团制度倾向于产生势均力敌的选举，这一现象在当今以及整个美国总统选举历史中都是如此。

27992.title: The Pandemic Economic Crisis, Precautionary Behavior, and Mobility Constraints: An Application of the Dynamic Disequilibrium Model with Randomness
27992.zh_title: 疫情经济危机、预防性行为与流动性约束：带随机性的动态非均衡模型的应用
27992.abstract: This paper analyzes the economic impact of the pandemic, providing insights into the consequences of alternative policies. Our framework focuses on three key features: (a) Covid-19 is a sectoral shock of unknown depth and duration affecting some sectors and technologies more than others; (b) there are constraints in shifting resources across sectors; and (c) there is a high level of uncertainty about the disease and its economic aftermath, inducing a high level of precautionary behavior by some agents and leading to others facing more severe credit constraints. Because of macroeconomic externalities, precautionary behavior exacerbates the downturn, and even sectors where Covid-19 does not directly affect consumption or production may face unemployment. Multipliers associated with different government expenditure programs differ markedly. The paper describes policies that can mitigate precautionary behavior, leading to reduced unemployment. Greater wage flexibility may lead to increased unemployment. \nThe precautionary behavior is the antithesis of equilibrium behavior, suggesting that standard equilibrium approaches may not provide the appropriate framework for analyzing the pandemic: individuals know that they don’t know the future, that existing and newly made contracts and plans may be broken, and that they need to be able to respond to these unknowable contingencies.
27992.zh_abstract: 本文分析了疫情的经济影响，为不同政策的后果提供了见解。我们的框架聚焦于三个关键特征：(a) 新冠疫情是一种深度和持续时间未知的部门冲击，对某些部门和技术的影响大于其他；(b) 跨部门转移资源存在约束；(c) 关于疾病及其经济后果存在高度不确定性，导致某些主体采取高度预防性行为，并使得其他主体面临更严格的信贷约束。由于宏观经济外部性，预防性行为加剧了经济衰退，即使新冠疫情未直接影响消费或生产的部门也可能面临失业。与不同政府支出计划相关的乘数存在显著差异。本文描述了可以缓解预防性行为、从而降低失业率的政策。更大的工资灵活性可能导致失业率上升。
27992.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：B22, E21, E23, E24, E61, E63, G28, J21, J23

27991.title: Piecewise-Linear Approximations and Filtering for DSGE Models with Occasionally Binding Constraints
27991.zh_title: 针对具有偶尔约束的DSGE模型的分段线性近似与滤波
27991.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Pablo Cuba-Borda, Kenji Higa-Flores, Frank Schorfheide, Sergio Villalvazo
27991.abstract: We develop an algorithm to construct approximate decision rules that are piecewise-linear and continuous for DSGE models with an occasionally binding constraint. The functional form of the decision rules allows us to derive a conditionally optimal particle filter (COPF) for the evaluation of the likelihood function that exploits the structure of the solution. We document the accuracy of the likelihood approximation and embed it into a particle Markov chain Monte Carlo algorithm to conduct Bayesian estimation. Compared with a standard bootstrap particle filter, the COPF significantly reduces the persistence of the Markov chain, improves the accuracy of Monte Carlo approximations of posterior moments, and drastically speeds up computations. We use the techniques to estimate a small-scale DSGE model to assess the effects of the government spending portion of the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act in 2009 when interest rates reached the zero lower bound.
27991.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种算法，用于为具有偶尔约束的动态随机一般均衡模型构建分段线性且连续的近似决策规则。决策规则的函数形式使我们能够推导出一个条件最优粒子滤波器，用于评估似然函数，该滤波器利用了求解的结构。我们记录了似然近似的准确性，并将其嵌入到粒子马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛算法中，以进行贝叶斯估计。与标准自助粒子滤波器相比，条件最优粒子滤波器显著降低了马尔可夫链的持久性，提高了后验矩蒙特卡洛近似的准确性，并大幅加快了计算速度。我们利用这些技术估计一个小型动态随机一般均衡模型，以评估2009年利率触及零下限时《美国复苏与再投资法案》中政府支出部分的影响。

27990.title: The ESG-Innovation Disconnect: Evidence from Green Patenting
27990.zh_title: ESG与创新的脱节：来自绿色专利的证据
27990.authors: Lauren Cohen, Umit G. Gurun, Quoc H. Nguyen
27990.abstract: No firm or sector of the global economy is untouched by innovation. In equilibrium, innovators will flock to (and innovation will occur) where the returns to innovative capital are the highest. In this paper, we document a strong empirical pattern in green patent production. Specifically, we find that oil, gas, and energy-producing firms – firms with lower Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) scores, and who are often explicitly excluded from ESG funds’ investment universe – are key innovators in the United States’ green patent landscape. These energy producers produce more, and significantly higher quality, green innovation. In many green technology spaces, they appear to be influential first-movers, not easily substitutable, and to produce ongoing foundational aspects of innovation and commercialization on which other alternative energy producers build. This is broadly true across the green patenting spectrum, and continues through the present day, concentrating specifically in certain green technology branches (for instance, in carbon capture).
27990.zh_abstract: 全球经济的任何企业或部门都无法免受创新的影响。在均衡状态下，创新者将涌向（创新将发生在）创新资本回报最高的地方。在本文中，我们记录了绿色专利生产中的一个强烈实证模式。具体而言，我们发现石油、天然气和能源生产企业——这些企业环境、社会和治理得分较低，且常被明确排除在ESG基金的投资范围之外——是美国绿色专利格局中的关键创新者。这些能源生产商生产了更多且质量显著更高的绿色创新。在许多绿色技术领域，它们似乎是具有影响力的先行者，不易被替代，并持续生产其他替代能源生产商赖以发展的基础性创新和商业化要素。这在绿色专利谱系中普遍成立，并持续至今，尤其集中在某些绿色技术分支（例如碳捕获）。
27990.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE, PR；JEL：G11, G30, O31, O32

27989.title: Partisan Residential Sorting on Climate Change Risk
27989.zh_title: 气候变化风险上的党派居住分化
27989.authors: Asaf Bernstein, Stephen B. Billings, Matthew Gustafson, Ryan Lewis
27989.abstract: Is climate change partisanship reflected in residential decisions? Comparing individual properties in the same zip code with similar elevation and proximity to the coast, houses exposed to sea level rise (SLR) are increasingly more likely to be owned by Republicans and less likely to be owned by Democrats. We find a partisan residency gap for even moderately SLR exposed properties of more than 5 percentage points, which has more than doubled over the past six years. Findings are unchanged controlling flexibly for other individual demographics and a variety of granular property characteristics, including the value of the home. Residential sorting manifests among owners regardless of occupancy, but not among renters, and is driven by long-run SLR exposure but not current flood risk. Anticipatory sorting on climate change suggests that households that are most likely to vote against climate friendly policies and least likely to adapt may ultimately bear the burden of climate change.
27989.zh_abstract: 气候变化党派性是否反映在居住决策中？比较同一邮政编码区内海拔和海岸距离相似的独立房产，暴露于海平面上升风险的房屋越来越可能由共和党人拥有，而越来越不可能由民主党人拥有。我们发现，即使是中等海平面上升暴露的房产，党派居住差距也超过5个百分点，并且这一差距在过去六年中翻了一番以上。在灵活控制其他个人人口统计特征和多种精细房产特征（包括房屋价值）后，结果保持不变。居住分化体现在无论是否自住的业主中，但租户中不存在，且由长期海平面上升暴露驱动，而非当前洪水风险。针对气候变化的预期性居住分化表明，最可能投票反对气候友好政策且最不可能适应的家庭，最终可能承担气候变化的负担。
27989.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D10, D72, G1, G5, Q5, Q54, R2, R21, R23, R31

27988.title: Expectations, Infections, and Economic Activity
27988.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Miguel Godinho de Matos, Francisco Lima, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
27988.abstract: This paper develops a quantitative theory of how people weigh the risks of infections against the benefits of engaging in social interactions that contribute to the spread of infectious diseases. Our framework takes into account the interrelated yet distinct effects of public policies and private behavior on the spread of the disease. We evaluate the model using a novel micro data set on consumption expenditures in Portugal. The estimated model accounts for the cross-sectional consumption response of individuals of different ages at a given time, as well as the time-series response of consumption of the young and old across the first three waves of Covid. Our model highlights the critical role of expectations in shaping how human behavior influences the dynamics of epidemics.
27988.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个定量理论，用以分析人们如何在感染风险与参与社交互动（这些互动会促进传染病传播）的收益之间进行权衡。我们的框架考虑了公共政策和私人行为对疾病传播相互关联但又截然不同的影响。我们利用葡萄牙消费支出的新型微观数据集对模型进行了评估。估计出的模型解释了特定时间点不同年龄个体的横截面消费反应，以及新冠前三波疫情中年轻人和老年人消费的时间序列反应。我们的模型强调了预期在塑造人类行为如何影响流行病动态中的关键作用。

27987.title: Reliance on Science by Inventors: Hybrid Extraction of In-text Patent-to-Article Citations
27987.zh_title: 发明人对科学的依赖：专利正文中专利-论文引用的混合提取
27987.abstract: We curate and characterize a complete set of citations from patents to scientific articles, including nearly 16 million from the full text of USPTO and EPO patents. Combining heuristics and machine learning, we achieve 25% higher performance than machine learning alone. At 99.4% accuracy, coverage of 87.6% is achieved, and coverage above 90% with accuracy above 93%. Performance is evaluated with a set of 5,939 randomly-sampled, cross-verified “known good” citations, which the authors have never seen. We compare these “in-text” citations with the “official” citations on the front page of patents. In-text citations are more diverse temporally, geographically, and topically. They are less self-referential and less likely to be recycled from one patent to the next. That said, in-text citations have been overshadowed by front-page in the past few decades, dropping from 80% of all paper-to-patent citations to less than 40%. In replicating two published articles that use only citations on the front page of patents, we show that failing to capture those in the body text leads to understating the relationship between academic science and commercial invention. All patent-to-article citations, as well as the known-good test set, are available at http://relianceonscience.org.
27987.zh_abstract: 我们整理并描述了一套完整的从专利到科学文章的引用集，包括来自美国专利商标局和欧洲专利局专利全文的近1600万条引用。结合启发式方法和机器学习，我们实现了比单独使用机器学习高出25%的性能。在99.4%的准确率下，覆盖率达到87.6%，并且当准确率超过93%时，覆盖率超过90%。性能通过一组5939个随机抽样、交叉验证的“已知正确”引用进行评估，作者此前从未见过这些引用。我们将这些“正文内”引用与专利首页上的“官方”引用进行了比较。正文内引用在时间、地理和主题上更加多样化。它们更少自我引用，也更少从一个专利重复使用到下一个专利。尽管如此，在过去几十年中，正文内引用已被首页引用所掩盖，从占所有专利-论文引用的80%下降到不足40%。在复现两篇仅使用专利首页引用的已发表文章时，我们表明，未能捕获正文中的引用会导致低估学术科学与商业发明之间的关系。所有专利-论文引用以及已知正确的测试集均可从http://relianceonscience.org获取。

27986.title: The Dynamic Impact of Exporting on Firm R&D Investment
27986.zh_title: 出口对企业研发投资的动态影响
27986.authors: Florin G. Maican, Matilda Orth, Mark J. Roberts, Van Anh Vuong
27986.abstract: This article estimates a dynamic structural model of firm R&D investment in twelve Swedish manufacturing industries and uses it to measure rates of return to R&D and to simulate the impact of trade restrictions on the investment incentives. R&D spending is found to have a larger impact on firm productivity in the export market than in the domestic market. Export market profits are a substantial source of the expected return to R&D. Counterfactual simulations show that trade restrictions lower both the expected return to R&D and R&D investment level, thus reducing an important source of the dynamic gains from trade. A 20 percent tariff on Swedish exports reduces the expected benefits of R&D by an average of 32.2 percent and lowers the amount of R&D spending by 13.9 percent in the high-tech industries. The corresponding reductions in the low-tech industries are 30.4 and 8.9 percent, respectively. R&D adjustments in response to export tariffs mainly occur on the intensive, rather than the extensive, margin.
27986.zh_abstract: 本文估计了瑞典十二个制造业行业中企业研发投资的动态结构模型，并利用该模型衡量研发回报率以及模拟贸易限制对投资激励的影响。研究发现，研发支出对出口市场中企业生产率的影响大于对国内市场的影响。出口市场利润是研发预期回报的重要来源。反事实模拟表明，贸易限制降低了研发的预期回报和研发投资水平，从而削弱了贸易动态收益的一个重要来源。对瑞典出口征收20%的关税会使高科技行业研发的预期收益平均降低32.2%，并使研发支出金额减少13.9%。低科技行业的相应降幅分别为30.4%和8.9%。研发对出口关税的调整主要发生在集约边际上，而非广延边际上。

27985.title: Some Facts about Dominant Firms
27985.zh_title: 关于主导企业的一些事实
27985.abstract: We measure the evolution of dominant firms in the U.S. economy since 1960, and globally since 1990. Contrary to common wisdom, dominant firms have not become larger, have not become more productive, and their contribution to aggregate productivity growth has fallen by more than one third since 2000.
27985.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了自1960年以来美国经济中以及自1990年以来全球经济中主导企业的演变。与普遍看法相反，主导企业并未变得更大，也未变得更具生产力，而且它们对总体生产率增长的贡献自2000年以来下降了超过三分之一。
27985.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D24, L11, O40

27984.title: Communication and Bargaining Breakdown: An Empirical Analysis
27984.zh_title: 沟通与谈判破裂：一项实证分析
27984.authors: Matthew Backus, Thomas Blake, Jett Pettus, Steven Tadelis
27984.abstract: Bargaining breakdown—whether as delay, conflict, or missing trade—plagues bargaining in environments with incomplete information. Can a bargaining environment that facilitates or restricts communication alleviate these costs? We exploit a unique opportunity to study this question using real market transactions: eBay Germany’s Best Offer platform. On May 23, 2016, the platform introduced unstructured communication allowing buyers and sellers on the desktop version of the site, but not the mobile app, to accompany price offers with a message. Using this natural experiment, our difference-in-differences approach documents a 14% decrease in the the rate of breakdown among compliers. Though adoption is immediate, the effect is not. We show, using text analysis, that the dynamics are consistent with repeat players learning how to use communication in bargaining, and that the messaging strategies of experienced sellers are correlated with successful bargaining.
27984.zh_abstract: 谈判破裂——无论是表现为延迟、冲突还是交易缺失——困扰着信息不完全环境中的谈判。一个促进或限制沟通的谈判环境能否减轻这些成本？我们利用一个独特的机会，通过真实市场交易来研究这个问题：eBay德国的“最佳报价”平台。2016年5月23日，该平台引入了非结构化沟通，允许桌面版网站（而非移动应用）上的买家和卖家在报价时附带一条消息。利用这一自然实验，我们的双重差分方法记录了在依从者中谈判破裂率下降了14%。尽管采用是即时的，但效果并非如此。我们通过文本分析表明，这种动态与重复参与者学习如何在谈判中使用沟通是一致的，并且经验丰富的卖家的消息传递策略与成功的谈判相关。
27984.meta: Programs：IO, LS, POL；JEL：C78, D82, D83, M21

27983.title: Input-Output Networks and Misallocation
27983.zh_title: 投入产出网络与资源错配
27983.authors: Jing Hang, Pravin Krishna, Heiwai Tang
27983.abstract: This paper develops a framework for studying the macroeconomic costs of resource misallocation. The framework enables the assessment of the conditions under which the existing estimates in the misallocation literature, which are largely based on a value-added production structure and ignore inter-sectoral linkages, provide an unbiased estimate of misallocation costs in relation to a more general setting, in which production of gross output relies upon input-output linkages across sectors. We show that in the absence of intermediate input distortions, the two approaches are isomorphic and will yield the same estimated aggregate productivity loss. When firm-specific intermediate input distortions are present, however, the value-added model produces biased estimates of TFP losses due to both model misspecification and incorrect inferences of firms' productivity and distortions. Using Chinese and Indian enterprise data, we find quantitatively similar TFP losses from resource misallocation for China, regardless of the model used, while for India, we infer significantly larger TFP losses under the gross output model.
27983.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个研究资源错配宏观经济成本的框架。该框架能够评估在何种条件下，现有错配文献中的估计（这些估计主要基于增加值生产结构并忽略部门间联系）相对于一个更一般的设定（其中总产出生产依赖于跨部门的投入产出联系）能够提供无偏的错配成本估计。我们表明，在不存在中间投入扭曲的情况下，这两种方法同构，并将得出相同的估计总生产率损失。然而，当存在企业特定的中间投入扭曲时，增加值模型会因模型设定错误以及对生产率和扭曲的错误推断而产生有偏的全要素生产率损失估计。利用中国和印度的企业数据，我们发现对于中国，无论使用哪种模型，资源错配导致的全要素生产率损失在数量上相似；而对于印度，我们在总产出模型下推断出显著更大的全要素生产率损失。
27983.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, PR；JEL：E1, E23, L16, O11, O4

27982.title: When Externalities Collide: Influenza and Pollution
27982.zh_title: 当外部性碰撞时：流感和污染
27982.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Matthew J. Neidell, Nicholas J. Sanders, Gregor Singer
27982.abstract: Influenza and air pollution each pose significant health risks with global economic consequences. Their shared etiological pathways present a case of compounding health risk via interacting externalities. Using instrumental variables based on changing wind direction, we show increased levels of contemporaneous pollution increase influenza hospitalizations. We exploit random variation in effectiveness of the influenza vaccine as an additional instrument to show vaccine protection neutralizes this relationship. Thus, pollution control and vaccination campaigns jointly provide greater returns than those implied by addressing either in isolation. We show the importance of this consideration in addressing observed gaps in influenza incidence by race.
27982.zh_abstract: 流感和空气污染各自都构成重大的健康风险，并带来全球经济后果。它们共同的病因学途径呈现了一个通过相互作用的外部性导致复合健康风险的案例。利用基于风向变化的工具变量，我们表明同期污染水平的增加会提高流感住院率。我们利用流感疫苗有效性中的随机变异作为额外的工具变量，以表明疫苗保护能中和这种关系。因此，污染控制和疫苗接种运动共同带来的回报大于单独解决其中任何一个问题所隐含的回报。我们展示了这一考虑在解释按种族划分的流感发病率观察到的差距中的重要性。

27981.title: Personal Power Dynamics in Bargaining
27981.zh_title: 谈判中的个人权力动态
27981.authors: Renee Bowen, Ilwoo Hwang, Stefan Krasa
27981.abstract: We study bargaining between a fixed agenda-setter and responder over successive issues. If the responder rejects the setter’s proposal, the setter can attempt to assert her will to implement her ideal and will succeed with a probability that depends on her “personal power”. Players learn about the setter’s power as gridlock persists. Gridlock occurs when the setter’s perceived power is either too high or too low, and the players reach compromise when the setter has moderate personal power. The presence of “difficult” issues can induce more compromise as the players have incentives to avoid testing the setter’s power.
27981.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个固定的议程设定者与回应者就连续问题进行谈判的过程。如果回应者拒绝设定者的提议，设定者可以尝试主张其意志以实施其理想方案，并且成功的概率取决于她的“个人权力”。随着僵局的持续，参与者会了解设定者的权力。当设定者的感知权力过高或过低时，僵局就会发生；而当设定者拥有适度的个人权力时，参与者会达成妥协。“困难”问题的存在可以促使更多妥协，因为参与者有动机避免测试设定者的权力。

27980.title: Children and the Remaining Gender Gaps in the Labor Market
27980.zh_title: 子女与劳动力市场中持续存在的性别差距
27980.abstract: The past five decades have seen a remarkable convergence in the economic roles of men and women in society. Yet, persistently large gender gaps in terms of labor supply, earnings, and representation in top jobs remain. Moreover, in countries like the U.S., convergence in labor market outcomes appears to have slowed in recent decades. In this article, we focus on the role of children and show that many potential explanations for the remaining gender disparities in labor market outcomes are related to the fact that children impose significantly larger penalties on the career trajectories of women relative to men. In the U.S., we document that close to two-thirds of the overall gender earnings gap can be accounted for by the differential impacts of children on women and men. We propose a simple model of household decision-making to motivate the link between children and gender gaps in the labor market, and to help rationalize how various factors potentially interact with parenthood to produce differential outcomes for men and women. We discuss several forces that might make the road to gender equity even more challenging for modern cohorts of parents, and offer a critical discussion of public policies in seeking to address the remaining gaps.
27980.zh_abstract: 过去五十年间，男性和女性在社会中的经济角色出现了显著趋同。然而，在劳动力供给、收入以及高层职位代表性方面，仍然存在持续且巨大的性别差距。此外，在美国等国家，劳动力市场结果的趋同速度近几十年来似乎有所放缓。在本文中，我们聚焦于子女的作用，并表明，对于劳动力市场结果中剩余性别差异的许多潜在解释，都与这样一个事实相关：相较于男性，子女对女性的职业轨迹造成了显著更大的惩罚。在美国，我们记录到，总体性别收入差距中近三分之二可由子女对女性和男性的不同影响来解释。我们提出了一个简单的家庭决策模型，以阐明子女与劳动力市场性别差距之间的联系，并帮助理解各种因素如何可能与为人父母的身份相互作用，从而为男性和女性带来不同的结果。我们讨论了若干可能使现代父母群体实现性别平等的道路更具挑战性的力量，并对旨在解决剩余差距的公共政策进行了批判性讨论。

27979.title: The Value of Social Status
27979.authors: Alexander W. Butler, Bruce I. Carlin, Alan D. Crane, Boyang Liu, James P. Weston
27979.abstract: We quantify the value of social status using market prices for Delaware license plates. Delaware plates are numbered sequentially, are private property, and can be legally bequeathed or traded in a secondary market. License plates offer no direct economic benefit other than authorizing the operation of a motor vehicle. But they appear to be a source of social status. Not only do market prices suggest a preference for lower plate numbers, but there exist extreme price jumps that indicate that exclusive clubs exist whereby the number of digits on the plate convey implicit membership. The aggregate value of this market indicates that people purchase status as a significant portion of their consumption bundle. Finally, social status as an asset appears to be uncorrelated with aggregate economic and market conditions.
27979.zh_abstract: 我们利用特拉华州车牌的市场价格来量化社会地位的价值。特拉华州车牌按顺序编号，属于私人财产，可以合法地遗赠或在二级市场上交易。车牌除了授权机动车行驶外，不提供直接的经济利益。但它们似乎是社会地位的一个来源。不仅市场价格显示出对较低车牌号的偏好，而且存在极端的价格跳跃，表明存在排他性俱乐部，其中车牌上的数字位数传达了隐含的会员身份。该市场的总价值表明，人们将地位作为其消费组合的重要组成部分进行购买。最后，作为一种资产，社会地位似乎与总体经济和市场状况不相关。

27978.title: Valuing Rare Pediatric Drugs: An Economics Perspective
27978.zh_title: 评估罕见儿科药物的价值：一个经济学视角
27978.authors: Rena M. Conti, Jonathan Gruber, Daniel A. Ollendorf, Peter J. Neumann
27978.abstract: There is a coming wave of novel genetic therapies aiming to treat rare pediatric disease. A large literature investigates the valuation of new treatments, but the valuation of treatments for rare pediatric illness raises a host of unique issues. In this paper, we review the challenges of applying both the standard economic model and standard approaches to estimating cost-effectiveness using the quality-adjusted life year (QALY) to this case. We argue that there are a large number of special issues that have only been partially addressed by past work and we conclude that more data and the development of new methods are vital as innovators, health technology assessment practitioners and policymakers confront the launch of these new drugs.
27978.zh_abstract: 旨在治疗罕见儿科疾病的新型基因疗法浪潮即将到来。大量文献研究了新疗法的估值，但对罕见儿科疾病治疗的估值引发了一系列独特的问题。在本文中，我们回顾了将标准经济模型以及使用质量调整生命年（QALY）估算成本效益的标准方法应用于此案例所面临的挑战。我们认为，存在大量过去工作仅部分涉及的特殊问题，并且我们得出结论，随着创新者、卫生技术评估从业者和政策制定者面对这些新药的上市，更多数据和新方法的开发至关重要。

27977.title: The Liquidity Sensitivity of Healthcare Consumption: Evidence from Social Security Payments
27977.zh_title: 医疗消费的流动性敏感性：来自社会保障金的证据
27977.authors: Tal Gross, Timothy Layton, Daniel Prinz
27977.abstract: Some consumers lack the cash needed to pay for medical care. As a result, they either delay care until they can pay for it or they forgo the care altogether. To test for such a possibility, we study the distribution of monthly Social Security checks among Medicare Part D enrollees. When Social Security checks are distributed, prescription fills increase by 6-12 percent. In that sense, drug consumption of low-income Medicare recipients is "liquidity sensitive." We then study recipients who transition onto a program that eliminates copayments. When those recipients do not face copayments, their drug consumption becomes less liquidity sensitive. That finding implies that, beyond risk protection, generous insurance also provides recipients with the ability to consume healthcare when they need it rather than when they have cash. Further, we find that recipients whose drug consumption is most liquidity sensitive exhibit price elasticities of demand that are twice the size of the average elasticity, suggesting that more-generous insurance causes recipients both to re-time prescription filling and also to start filling prescriptions that they otherwise would not fill. We present a stylized model that uses this finding to call into question the conventional interpretation of demand-response to price as solely inefficient moral hazard.
27977.zh_abstract: 一些消费者缺乏支付医疗费用所需的现金。因此，他们要么推迟就医直到有能力支付，要么完全放弃治疗。为了检验这种可能性，我们研究了医疗保险D部分参保者中每月社会保障金的发放情况。当社会保障金发放时，处方药配药量增加了6%至12%。从这个意义上说，低收入医疗保险受益人的药物消费是“流动性敏感的”。然后，我们研究了转入一个取消共付额计划的受益人。当这些受益人无需面对共付额时，他们的药物消费变得不那么具有流动性敏感性。这一发现意味着，除了风险保护之外，慷慨的保险还为受益人提供了在需要时而非有现金时消费医疗保健的能力。此外，我们发现，药物消费对流动性最敏感的受益人，其需求价格弹性是平均弹性的两倍，这表明更慷慨的保险既导致受益人重新安排处方配药时间，也开始配取他们原本不会配取的处方药。我们提出了一个程式化模型，利用这一发现对将价格需求反应仅仅解释为低效道德风险的传统观点提出了质疑。
27977.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：G5, H0, I1, I13

27976.title: The (Missing) Relation Between Acquisition Announcement Returns and Value Creation
27976.zh_title: 收购公告收益与价值创造之间的（缺失）关系
27976.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Utpal Bhattacharya, Stacey E. Jacobsen
27976.abstract: Cumulative abnormal returns (CAR) computed around acquisition announcements are widely considered to be market-based assessments of expected value creation. We show, however, that announcement returns do not correlate with commonly used and new measures of ex-post outcomes. A simple characteristics-based model using standard information known at the announcement date can predict these outcomes reasonably well, yet CAR even fails to capture the predictions from this model. Evidence suggests that information about the standalone acquirer dominates CAR, making it virtually impossible to extract deal-related information. We conclude that CAR is an unreliable measure of expected value creation.
27976.zh_abstract: 围绕收购公告计算的累积异常收益（CAR）被广泛视为基于市场的预期价值创造评估。然而，我们表明，公告收益与常用及新的事后结果衡量指标并不相关。一个使用公告日已知标准信息的简单基于特征的模型可以相当好地预测这些结果，但CAR甚至未能捕捉到该模型的预测。证据表明，关于独立收购方的信息主导了CAR，使得提取交易相关信息几乎不可能。我们得出结论，CAR是预期价值创造的一个不可靠的衡量指标。

27975.title: Milton Friedman and Exchange Rates in Developing Countries
27975.zh_title: 米尔顿·弗里德曼与发展中国家的汇率
27975.abstract: Milton Friedman’s famous 1953 essay, “The case for flexible exchange rates,” deals entirely with advanced nations. An interesting question is what Friedman thought about exchange rate and monetary regimes in emerging economies. In this paper I investigate how his views on the subject evolved through time. I analyze speeches, articles, and interviews. I examine his archives for correspondence and unpublished manuscripts. I show that for him flexible rates were a second best solution for middle income and poor nations. I also analyze Friedman’s role in Chile’s failed attempt, during the Pinochet regime, at using a fixed exchange rate to stabilize the economy and eliminate inflation.
27975.zh_abstract: 米尔顿·弗里德曼1953年著名的论文《支持浮动汇率的理由》完全针对发达国家。一个有趣的问题是，弗里德曼对新兴经济体的汇率和货币制度有何看法。在本文中，我研究了他的观点在这一主题上如何随时间演变。我分析了演讲、文章和访谈。我查阅了他的档案，寻找信件和未发表的手稿。我表明，对他来说，浮动汇率对中等收入和贫穷国家而言是次优选择。我还分析了弗里德曼在智利皮诺切特政权期间，试图利用固定汇率稳定经济和消除通胀的失败尝试中所扮演的角色。
27975.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：B17, B2, B22, B27, B3, F31, F32

27974.title: Socioeconomic Status and the Experience of Pain: An Example from Knees
27974.zh_title: 社会经济地位与疼痛体验：以膝盖为例
27974.authors: David M. Cutler, Ellen Meara, Susan Stewart
27974.abstract: Reports of pain differ markedly across socioeconomic groups and are correlated with outcomes such as functional limitations and disability insurance receipt. This paper examines the differential experience of pain by education. We focus on knee pain, the most common musculoskeletal complaint. Comparing clinical interpretation of knee x-rays of people with and without pain, there are few differences in presence or clinical severity of arthritis across education groups. In contrast, less educated people report more pain for any given objective measure of arthritis. After confirming that reported pain maps to objective measures like walking speed and range of motion, we test four theories for differential experience of pain: differences in obesity, physically demanding occupations, psychological factors, and medical treatment differences. We find that physical demands on the job and obesity each explain about one-third of the education gradient in knee pain. There is an interaction between the two; physical requirements on the job are associated with knee pain primarily in those who are obese. In contrast, psychological traits and access to medical care explain little of the difference in reported pain by education level. These findings imply that educational gradients in pain are likely to persist or even widen as the need for physically demanding occupations—like home health aides and personal service workers—grows in importance with the aging population, and the working population continues to be obese.
27974.zh_abstract: 疼痛的报告在不同社会经济群体之间存在显著差异，并且与功能限制和伤残保险领取等结果相关。本文考察了不同教育程度下疼痛体验的差异。我们聚焦于膝盖疼痛，这是最常见的肌肉骨骼主诉。通过比较有疼痛和无疼痛人群的膝盖X光片的临床解读，我们发现不同教育群体之间关节炎的存在或临床严重程度几乎没有差异。相比之下，对于任何给定的关节炎客观测量指标，受教育程度较低的人报告了更多的疼痛。在确认报告的疼痛与步行速度和关节活动范围等客观指标相符后，我们检验了关于疼痛体验差异的四种理论：肥胖差异、体力要求高的职业、心理因素以及医疗治疗差异。我们发现，工作中的体力要求和肥胖各自解释了膝盖疼痛教育梯度的大约三分之一。两者之间存在交互作用；工作中的体力要求主要与肥胖者的膝盖疼痛相关。相比之下，心理特征和医疗服务的可及性几乎无法解释按教育水平划分的疼痛报告差异。这些发现意味着，随着人口老龄化，对家庭健康助理和个人服务工作者等体力要求高的职业的需求日益增长，且劳动人口持续肥胖，疼痛的教育梯度可能会持续甚至扩大。
